programme.desc: After starting off on the wrong foot with his new supervisor, Jim finds himself face to face with the new boss in a soccer game being held in the Dunder Mifflin parking lot. Meanwhile, Michael, afraid to face the workday, has trouble leaving his house.

programme.title: The Office: The Michael Scott Paper Company
programme.desc: Michael hosts a company luncheon, while Dwight and Andy strike up an unlikely friendship and plan a hunting trip.

programme.title: The Office: Heavy Competition
programme.desc: Dwight's loyalty to Michael is tested when he finds a new hero in Charles. Meanwhile, Andy tries to provide for all of Jim's emotional needs.

programme.title: The Office: Broke
programme.desc: Michael's new company struggles to make early morning deliveries while the office tries to get their expense reports in on time after Angela enforces Dunder Mifflin's policy.

programme.title: The Office: Casual Friday
programme.desc: Michael has to mediate a dispute within his new sales team. Meanwhile, trouble brews in the office when several employees take the term 'casual' Fridays too loosely.

programme.title: Movie: Joe Dirt
programme.desc: After being abandoned at the Grand Canyon as a child, an adult Joe Dirt, who is now a white-trash janitor, begins a search for his birth parents. He meets many zany people along the way but realizes he belongs with the beautiful Brandy from Silvertown.

programme.title: Movie: The Longest Yard
programme.desc: Paul 'Wrecking' Crewe, a former football superstar, ends up in prison after a drunk driving incident, and is recruited by the warden to put together an inmate football team to compete against the prison guards.

programme.title: The King of Queens: G'Night Stalker
programme.desc: When Doug starts receiving fan mail from someone who saw his performance at a karaoke club, he lets the attention go to his head, only to have his ego shattered when the emails suddenly stop.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Raygin' Bulls
programme.desc: After a quick shopping spree for some snazzy new clothes, Doug and Ray decide to check out the new nightclub in town. Confident that they still have the moves, they make a small wager to see which one can convince a girl to dance with him first.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Baker's Doesn't
programme.desc: When Doug and Carrie run into Father McDaniel at the movies they feel guilty that they haven't been to church in some time and sign up to help out during the busy holiday season. Meanwhile, Arthur and Spence try to write a Christmas carol.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Fresh Brood
programme.desc: In order to help convince Carrie it's time for a child, Doug borrows the baby from Danny so they can give parenting a test run. Doug quickly adjusts to being a dad, but the transition isn't as smooth for Carrie.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Gambling N'Diction
programme.desc: When Doug's mother beats him and the guys in a friendly game of poker, Doug sees an opportunity to capitalize on her poker skills and help him win a high stakes poker tournament.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Apartment Complex
programme.desc: In need of a place to hang out, Doug and the guys decide to rent an apartment above their favourite Chinese restaurant. Meanwhile, in order to keep her new client, Kirstie Alley, happy, Carrie is forced to consume large quantities of food in front of her.

programme.title: Movie: The Holiday
programme.desc: Two women with romance issues swap homes and fall for men in their new neighbourhoods.

programme.title: Movie: Where the Heart Is
programme.desc: A young woman gives birth in Wal-Mart and is taken in by the quirky local community.

programme.title: Movie: Killer Prom
programme.desc: A high school senior life is shattered when her mother dies, but her hip and young cousin does whatever it takes to turn her life around.

programme.title: Movie: Trapped Model
programme.desc: An aspiring model is held hostage by a fashion photographer and forced to star on his sexy website.

programme.title: Movie: Dangerous Lessons
programme.desc: A high school teacher must use her wit and strength to save her family from her obsessive stalker- who also happens to be her student.

programme.title: Movie: Homekilling Queen
programme.desc: When an entitled daughter sets her sights on becoming Homecoming Queen, she and her mother will stop at nothing to win the crown.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Last Dance
programme.desc: Evidence tells investigators that a woman was thrown over the side of a bridge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Constructive Critcism
programme.desc: When a man is found dead, having been stabbed 46 times, and police are stuck sifting through the DNA. After an arduous search, they find their killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naughty or Nyce
programme.desc: Footprints leading away from a car accident point police in a new direction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Going for Broke
programme.desc: A Russian immigrant stockbroker is found dead and a strange phone call to his office is the only clue investigators have to go on - until they're led to a client who's made some bad investments, and a dog that sheds a little more than his owner realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Weakest Link
programme.desc: There are no clues to identify a body found along a rural road. Even after a determined detective finds the 'key' to identifying her, it takes a close analysis of a tire tread and a broken piece of jewellery to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Tom Petty: Mysterious Ending
programme.desc: News of the sudden passing of celebrated rock musician Tom Petty shocked fans worldwide, but a deeper look into the music legend’s life reveals physical and emotional afflictions that may have led to his death at age 66.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Selena: Fatal Encounter
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes of Selena's red-hot career, ambitions and tragic demise. Rare interviews include her close friend and co-fashion designer, the back-up in her band, and a nurse who spoke to Selena and ger killer just before she died.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Ties
programme.desc: An esteemed couple is brutally attacked in their home, leaving one dead and the other gravely injured. The survivor identifies the killer but recants her admission leaving investigators probing for answers. A DNA hit captures the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trouble Brewing
programme.desc: A high-priced call girl is murdered on the outskirts of Columbia, SC, and find that a six-pack of beer may be their only link to the person responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Covet Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Olamide Elizabeth Adeyooye, a science major has been missing for 48 hrs, and her family grows increasingly concerned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writing on the Wall
programme.desc: A gorgeous flight attendant is brutally murdered in her own home and the laundry list of suspects is growing by the minute. A striking clue at the scene leads investigators in the wrong direction, but will forensic evidence get them back on track?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Internal Affair
programme.desc: Friends and family of a woman gone missing were determined to find her until their worst fears were confirmed weeks later. Blood evidence and computer forensics helped investigators to catch the killer, and convince the jury of his guilt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Case of the Flue
programme.desc: In 1993, when an 83 year old woman was found dead in her home, investigators used clues like flecks of paint, t-shirt fibres, and a cellular phone to work out just how, and why, she died.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Impression
programme.desc: For sixteen years, a woman's death was considered an accident. Until someone called the authorities suggesting it was murder-- and turned up dead themselves.

programme.title: Forensic Files: If I Were You
programme.desc: A retired school teacher vanishes, but even though he was missing his bills are paid on time and he continues to correspond with his family.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fashion Police
programme.desc: A victim had been stabbed more than thirty times, and the only evidence investigators had was a distinctive button found at the scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Dis-Service
programme.desc: A young woman attends evening church services... then disappears. Eyewitnesses place her at a nearby gas station, getting into a van. Three days later when her body is discovered, the search for the driver of that van intensifies.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Charles Manson: The Devil's Work
programme.desc: This episode details the horror of Charles Manson's vicious attacks and explains how he was able to convince his hippie followers to brutally murder innocent strangers.

programme.title: Very Scary People: BTK: Bind, Torture, Kill
programme.desc: Wichita residents live in fear that they will be a killer's next victim.

programme.title: Very Scary People: BTK: The Taunting
programme.desc: For years the BTK killer plays a cat and mouse game with law enforcement and the media taunting them as he seeks the attention he craves.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Co-Ed Killer: The Murder Capital Of The World (Part 1)
programme.desc: A frantic public, desperate for answers, live in terror, waiting for the man they dubbed 'The Co-Ed Killer' to strike again. But no one could have expected that the person responsible, a local man, Edmund Kemper, was living among them.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Co-Ed Killer: Thinking Murder All Day Long (Part 2)
programme.desc: In April 1973, 24-year-old Edmund Kemper had murdered six coeds in and around the city of Santa Cruz, California, shaking the community to its core.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Night Stalker: Summer Of Terror (Part 1)
programme.desc: The summer of 1985 was one of the hottest Los Angeles had seen in a century. But terrified residents weren't sleeping with the windows open, they weren't sleeping at all. A killer was on the loose. He was the Night Stalker.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Total Meltdown
programme.desc: Suffering the icy burn of possible defeat, Kris wrecks his 3-diver relay plan and abandons his crew. Shawn is forced to question TOMCOD. Emily returns home to Claim 14. Vernon gambles on the edge of the ice.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Cold Man and the Sea
programme.desc: The clock ticks as Shawn races to prove the viability of the TOMCOD. Kris makes amends with his crew and Brad dives for the first time in five years, saving the day with a surprise. Back on Claim 14, Emily tries to break her ice season curse.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Dredged Up: Freezer Burn
programme.desc: With added scenes and facts: Shawn fights frozen ground and Kris' plan to beat the cold fizzles out as temperatures plummet to a season low. Later, Vernon takes his chances on a new spot.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Up in Flames
programme.desc: As an arctic blizzard wreaks havoc across Nome, Kris finds gold under the ice but fire erupts overhead. Shawn struggles to rescue his operation. Emily risks it all on a double dive and Vernon leans on a diver making her comeback.

programme.title: 100 Days Wild: Hangry Days
programme.desc: Stranded, freezing and desperate for food, Adam and Evan make a dangerous journey to basecamp. When outpost founders Andrew and Jennifer take control of the food supply, it's the last straw for Adam. Oliver tries to survive solo as temperatures plummet.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Golden Pillars
programme.desc: Mining for gold is a dangerous business with flipped trucks, burning washplants and sunken excavators are just a few of the many possible hazards. Experts in the field reveal how cutting-edge tech and ingenuity are making the job safer and more efficient.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Up in Flames
programme.desc: As an arctic blizzard wreaks havoc across Nome, Kris finds gold under the ice but fire erupts overhead. Shawn struggles to rescue his operation. Emily risks it all on a double dive and Vernon leans on a diver making her comeback.

programme.title: 100 Days Wild: Hangry Days
programme.desc: Stranded, freezing and desperate for food, Adam and Evan make a dangerous journey to basecamp. When outpost founders Andrew and Jennifer take control of the food supply, it's the last straw for Adam. Oliver tries to survive solo as temperatures plummet.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Nugget Hunter
programme.desc: Rick and his dad fly high into Keno mountains on a treasure hunt. Parker makes a decision about his crew that could determine the fate of his season. Tony checks a spot the old dredges missed and assesses which of his kids might take over one day.

programme.title: Dodgeball Thunderdome: Mother of All Thunderdomes
programme.desc: Exploding balls, a barrage of buckshot and a new adversary making its debut all plague contestants competing for a shot at the $25,000 grand prize. A realtor tries to close the deal and a hospital administrator may need his employee discount.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds
programme.desc: A propane explosion in Australia, a tornado destroys a ranch in Kansas.

programme.title: Operation Fishing Freedom: U.S. Army Medal of Honor Recipient - Al Lynch
programme.desc: A decorated Vietnam veteran recounts saving the lives of three men and life after receiving the medal of honour from Nixon.

programme.title: Ed Stafford: First Man Out: Ed vs Hakim Isler
programme.desc: Ed goes head to head with ex-PSYOPS marine and real-life ninja, Hakim Isler, in the notorious Zoige Marshes of Sichuan Province. It's a test of willpower for both men as they sink in strength-sapping quick-mud.

programme.title: Major League Fishing: Bass Pro Tour: 2020 Stage Four Heavy Hitters Championship Round - Kissimmee
programme.desc: Anglers compete for $100000 and a $100000 Big Bass Bonus in Stage 4 Heavy Hitters Championship Round from Kissimmee, Florida.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Performance Pinto
programme.desc: The team continues converting the rusted '71 Pinto into a European performance car despite the passed deadline. Unwilling to compromise on the original vision, Chad presses on both day and night to get his creation ready for its dramatic big city reveal.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Samurai Sword of Power
programme.desc: Josh explores ancient shrines hidden in the mountains and underground tunnels across Japan in search for the missing mystical Honjo sword. Along the way, Josh learns the ways of the samurai and forges his own samurai sword.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Curse of the Golden Bell
programme.desc: Josh joins local divers in the Southeast Asian country of Myanmar to search for the ancient cursed Golden Bell of King Dhammazedi. To recover it, Josh dives into murky, violent waters that have claimed the lives of other divers.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Sultan's Heart
programme.desc: Josh travels to Turkey and Hungary searching for the heart of a former ruler.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: True Cross of Christ
programme.desc: Josh journeys to Jerusalem and Istanbul to pursue the True Cross of Christ.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Africa's Gold Hoard
programme.desc: Josh searches for the Kruger Millions in the harsh wild of South Africa.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Origins of Stonehenge
programme.desc: Josh travels to his ancestral home of Great Britain to explore the origins of Stonehenge. From high in the air to deep under the sea, he finds an unexpected network of monuments that could have inspired one of history's most mystical locations.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Digging Into D-Day
programme.desc: Josh Gates touches down in Normandy to investigate battles on land, air and sea. The expedition reveals a Nazi threat greater than ever imagined, unearthing a massive German bunker complex buried for 75 years.

programme.title: Darcey & Stacey: Clashes and Curve Balls
programme.desc: Darcey and Georgi bask in the afterglow of their romantic NYC date. When Darcey returns to Connecticut, she and Stacey ramp up for their trip to LA, but Mike drops a bomb on the twins that may derail their plans.

programme.title: Darcey & Stacey: Caught on Tape
programme.desc: Darcey and Stacey are just starting to adjust to the realities of COVID-19 when Stacey discovers another bombshell about Florian. Meanwhile, Darcey desperately tries to keep the sparks alive with Georgi before the flames flicker.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Before the 90 Days: B90 Strikes Back!: Hard Habit To Break
programme.desc: David tries to get closer to Lana. Avery says goodbye to Ash. Geoffrey finds himself caught in the middle of a sticky situation. Ed returns home. Stephanie reunites with her mom, and drama ensues when Lisa meets with Usman's elders.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: We Don't Do Anything Normal
programme.desc: Bodybuilder Melissa's dress vision is simple: it must show off her muscles. Shay may lose his cool with Randy as they help Kat, a bride with a tight budget. Jasmine wants a unique bridal look to match her one-of-a-kind wedding on top of the Grand Canyon.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: My Sisters are Picking Out My Dress!
programme.desc: Arlicia is letting her opinionated sisters plan her entire wedding, including choosing her wedding dress. Ameena has an unlimited budget and bridezilla tendencies. Karen is especially thankful to be shopping today after nearly losing her fiancé.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Gown to Match My Black Heart

programme.desc: Carrie befriends a gay guy but she soon realizes that she has to fight for his attention when they go out together. While under the influence of ecstasy, Samantha confesses to Richard that she loves him. Miranda's co-worker tells everyone she is pregnant.

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades of Grey
programme.desc: A literature student falls for a wealthy young entrepreneur, who makes clear that any relations between the two of them will be on his own terms. She soon comes to learn of his singular tastes and his need to be completely in control.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: World Class Flavor
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's crossing the country to get a taste of world-class flavour. From California to Florida and Seattle to Massachusetts, he's divin' into classic Greek, legit pierogis, and real-deal Belgian waffles made European-style.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Totally Fried
programme.desc: Guy Fieri searches for great joints where they're frying up a storm.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Bar Food and Bon Bons
programme.desc: Guy rolls coast to coast looking for flavour, and finds it in the most interesting places.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: You Can Only Get It Here
programme.desc: Guy is on the hunt for funky flavours, starting in San Francisco at an Asian/American/Mexican fusion joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Breakfast, Lunch & Dinner
programme.desc: Guy Fieri travels to Tampa Bay for authentic Mexican street food served out of a bus. In Virginia Beach, he has dinner at a popular seafood joint, and in San Antonio he visits a breakfast joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Old Standards, New Styles
programme.desc: This trip, Guy is hitting up spots serving comfort food that has been turned up a notch. In Long Beach, CA., and old school diner with a new chef is cooking some home-style classics.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fresh Fish and Funky Chicken
programme.desc: Guy is hitting the road for some outrageous seafood and tasty chicken. In Des Moines, Iowa, the trophy-winning barbecue joint is dishing out unique wings and an apple dumpling dessert.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Ordering All Kinds of Flavor
programme.desc: Guy Fieri cooks takeout with four DDD alums via video chat. There's real deal Italian from Scottsdale, AZ, American Indian fare from Denver, gourmet grub out of a Massachusetts lounge and short ribs all the way from Hawaii.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: One Street Wonders
programme.desc: This trip, Guy is heading to Cincinnati to try three righteous restaurants all on the same street. He checks out The Funky Pub where they're serving up all kinds of hot dogs and sammies.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Multitaskers
programme.desc: A Greek diner is decked out in neon and servin' up family recipes like Yia Yia's grape leaves. In Oxnard, Calif., the jack of all trades joint is baking, brewing and cooking all in the same restaurant.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Biscuits to Brisket
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's digging in to stick-to-your-ribs comfort food. In Atlanta, the down-home joint cooking up righteous chicken and biscuits and house-cured lox.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Extra Helpings
programme.desc: This trip, it's an exclusive peek at the lost footage of DDD: the places Guy Fieri's visited before, but all-new dishes never seen until now. Guy's digging in to money mussels, crispy pork skin and a lights-out lamb sandwich.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Ordering All Kinds of Flavor
programme.desc: Guy Fieri cooks takeout with four DDD alums via video chat. There's real deal Italian from Scottsdale, AZ, American Indian fare from Denver, gourmet grub out of a Massachusetts lounge and short ribs all the way from Hawaii.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Belly Up to Barcelona
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's crossing the Atlantic to take a big bite out of Barcelona, Spain. He's diving in to the many different cuisines the city has to offer, from a homey spot serving Galician-style octopus and soup.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Round the World Roundup
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri digs into a world of flavours all over the United States! In Smyrna, Georgia, a doctor-turned-chef fires up amazing Asian from righteous ramen to Korean wings. In Austin, Texas, two buddies turn out their tasty take on tacos.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Savory with a Side of Sweet
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri is jumping into some sweet and savory dishes. In Burlington, Vt., a vegan joint gettin' crazy with a crunch wrap and coconut-banana French toast.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple-D All-Stars
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's in the kitchen with some real Triple-D all-stars, cookin' up everything from gangster Greek in Salt Lake City to creative curry in Denver to amazing Asian in Miami and North Pole, Alaska.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Globe Tasting
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's getting an authentic taste of all ends of the earth. In Bakersfield, Calif., the firehouse-turned-restaurant firing up Latin-fusion favorites like basque lamb tacos and popcorn pork with a side of zing.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Soakin' Up Maui
programme.desc: Guy's cruising the islands with his buddy, Chef Reno Henriques, on a culinary tour of Maui, Hawaii.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Mex to the Max
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's crossing the states to get some south of the border flavor. From Florida to California, Southwest to Midwest, he's diving into everything from tacos, tamales and tortas to al pastor and pozole. Plus, fiery burritos and seafood sensations.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Pre-Game Perfection
programme.desc: A simple yet satisfying pre-game meal that will make you the hero.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Football Fun and Food
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli invites her family over for football, fun and lots of food, Cajun-style. Valerie serves her quickest gumbo ever, alongside a fresh spring salad. Red pepper hummus is on the menu and Valerie pays tribute to her father-in-law.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Breakfast of Champions
programme.desc: We're tailgating bright and early with a breakfast of champions. Sunny kicks things off with her breakin' the fast burger and Katie Lee brings her breakfast MVP, a slow cooker hash brown casserole. Jeff makes crispy buttermilk popcorn chicken.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Trisha's Southern Tailgate
programme.desc: Tailgating usually goes hand in hand with sports events, but Trisha has been hosting music-themed tailgate parties for years. Today she brings the tailgate home with her fan-favourite recipes and shares behind-the-scenes tour footage.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Appetizer Perfection
programme.desc: Molly is sharing her favourite appetizer recipes, starting with BBQ pulled pork nachos. She also makes gooey fried mozzarella sticks, ham and cheese jalapeno poppers with a spicy kick and flaky walleye cakes.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Tailgate Get-Togethers
programme.desc: Ree shares a lineup of tailgate-friendly favourites including Italian pork sandwiches and butternut squash and black bean enchiladas. There are also easy slow-cooker teriyaki ribs and a Greek seven-layer dip that's perfect for fall.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Quarterback Mom
programme.desc: Ree Drummond's quarterback teens have a big game coming up, and she's getting ahead by making their favorite food for a post-game dinner. Win or lose, they'll enjoy a fabulous meal of meatball subs.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Comfort Food Classics
programme.desc: The Kitchen is cozying up to comfort food classics! Katie Lee shares her grandma's creamy chicken and dumplings, and Jeff Mauro and his dad combine two favourites.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Grillin' and Chillin'
programme.desc: Kardea Brown invites friends over for an afternoon Lowcountry cookout. On the menu are Grilled Mahi Sandwiches, Grilled Shrimp Macaroni Salad and Grilled Potatoes tossed with EVOO and Chives. For something sweet, Kardea whips up a Berry Dump Cake.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: All About Family
programme.desc: Family and traditions mean a lot to Trisha, who shares her favoruite family recipes handed down over generations. The recipes include old-fashioned potato-beef casserole and Brunswick stew as well as a coconut cloud cake.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Pizza Pro Playoffs
programme.desc: Four professional pizza makers rise to the occasion in three pizza-themed Grocery Games that determine who gets to take home all the dough. Guy Fieri challenges the chefs to shop for the ingredients in their signature pizza using only a mini pizza box.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: DDD-licious Burgers
programme.desc: Guy Fieri invites his favorite burger chefs from Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives to compete in Flavortown and grill, baby, grill. First, Guy has the chefs shop for ingredients in their signature burger and loaded fries combo using only tongs and a grill lid.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Big Bacon Battle
programme.desc: Four chefs try to prove that everything’s better with bacon.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Patiently Weighting

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: A Fighting Spirit
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff helps a puppy after it is kicked in the head by a donkey, and later goes fishing for a hook stuck in a hungry beagle's throat. Dr. Amy helps a cat unable to walk and Dr. Nichols gets caught up in a wrestling match with an alpaca.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Nalla Fights Back
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff races to save a brave pit bull shot defending her owner during a robbery. Dr. Baier treats a guinea pig with an unusual problem. And Jeff and Hector head out to a wildlife sanctuary that needs their help with a couple of wolves.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: The Road Home
programme.desc: Dr. Baier races to save a young couple's cat after it is hit by a truck and Dr. Don operates on a basset hound with an unusual appetite. Also, Dr. Jeff and his team head to Mexico to provide desperately needed vet care to the community.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Care for Bear
programme.desc: When a family's beloved dog is hit by a car, Dr. Jeff races to save him. Dr Amy treats a cherished Yorkie with a mysterious wound. Then, when a cat begins losing weight, Dr. Baier must find out why.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: A Brave Pit Bull
programme.desc: When Dr. Jeff examines a beloved Weimaraner who has stopped eating, he makes a surprising discovery. Dr. Baier investigates the cause of a pet rabbit's mysterious fur loss. A servicewoman asks Dr. Jeff for help with her precious pit bull's injured leg.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Blown Away
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff and his team help a dog lost during a windstorm. Dr. Baier treats a small bird with a big personality. When a paralyzed dog is abandoned, Susan comes to the rescue. And the team head out to help an alligator injured in a fight.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: A Lucky Break
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff helps a dog with a serious illness. Mel and her daughter rescue a baby squirrel, while Dr. Jeff and Dr. Petra team up to save a beloved cat hit by a car. Dr. Baier gives a rabbit owner a surprise and a tiny dog with a big spirit needs a home.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Tiny Soul Mate
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff and Hector help 40 miniature Australian shepherds rescued from a puppy mill. Vet tech Christine turns to Dr. Jeff when her elderly Chihuahua has trouble walking. And Dr. Jeff is called out to treat an alpaca with a serious infection.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Happy Couple of Camels
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff helps a beloved German Shepherd walk again. The team tries to rescue a scared dog on the loose outside the clinic. Dr. Don must move fast when a family cat eats poison. And Dr. Jeff and Hector head for the mountains to help two rescued camels.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Head Over Heels
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff returns from a free vet care clinic with a dog who was hit by a car. The owner of a kitten with suspected ringworm gets more than she bargained for. Dr. Jeff treats a family dog with a mysterious lump. And, Dr. Baier falls for a rescued puppy.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: The Cutest Yak in Colorado
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff treats a couple's cherished bloodhound puppy that won't eat. Dr. Petra races to save a cat after he's swallowed a handful of hair ties. And Dr. Jeff and Hector head out to a veteran's ranch to help a baby therapy yak.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Somebody’s Daughter
programme.desc: Detectives often hit dead ends that can stop them cold but, for one young detective, dead ends were just another place to start. She'd beaten the odds in her own life. Now, she was determined to beat them on the job using her head and her heart.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Death in the Driveway
programme.desc: Melvin Roberts was larger than life. Former mayor. Prominent attorney. He even had a street named after him. When cops found him dead in his driveway, it marked the start of a tough case. In addition to friends, Melvin Roberts had plenty of enemies.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Devil in Our Country
programme.desc: A pleasant Michigan day takes a dark turn when a field hand digs up a human skull in a sprawling backyard. The discovery leaves a tight knit community shaken to its core and questioning whether a killer has penetrated the safety of their town.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Dead Girls Don't Talk
programme.desc: A horrific discovery in a backyard cornfield is just the beginning of an unspeakable scene. As horrors unfold in this small, Midwest town, someone is playing a deadly game of cat and mouse and it will be years before a ghastly truth is revealed.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Death in the Driveway
programme.desc: Melvin Roberts was larger than life. Former mayor. Prominent attorney. He even had a street named after him. When cops found him dead in his driveway, it marked the start of a tough case. In addition to friends, Melvin Roberts had plenty of enemies.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Player

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets in a Small Town

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Interrogation

programme.title: License to Kill: Deadly Pharmacist
programme.desc: Deception and greed drive a local pharmacist in Kansas City down an evil path, affecting the lives of thousands of helpless and trusting cancer patients who believe they're getting life-saving treatment.

programme.title: License to Kill: Death by Miracle Cure
programme.desc: Detectives in Colorado investigate a Naturopathic Doctor after two of his patients develop horrific side effects from dubious miracle treatments. What they uncover is a deadly history of fraud and barbaric, invasive medical treatments.

programme.title: License to Kill: Prescription for Murder
programme.desc: In the midst of the emerging opioid epidemic, investigators in Los Angeles look into a cluster of mysterious overdose deaths of young men in their 20's and discover a Doctor who uses her prescription pad to line her pockets and kill her patients.

programme.title: Snapped: Tracey Richter
programme.desc: A mother is hailed as a hero when she kills a home intruder, but a secret journal leads police to suspect she may have planned a cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Snapped: Shelia Eddy
programme.desc: A family searches for a missing teen only to find out she’s been betrayed by her closest friends.

programme.title: Snapped: Ajelina Lewis
programme.desc: A young father is murdered; suspicion turns to his child’s mother.

programme.title: Snapped: Carol Kopenkoskey
programme.desc: A 39-year marriage ends in a brutal death, revealing a surprising tale of adultery and murder.

programme.title: Movie: The Simpsons Movie
programme.desc: Homer's actions cause a leak of radioactive material from the Nuclear Plant into the river. Homer has to try and fix the problem before Springfield can no longer be saved.

programme.title: The Simpsons: What to Expect When Bart's Expecting
programme.desc: Bart can't stand art class, so he makes a voodoo doll of his art teacher. But when his spell makes her pregnant instead, he becomes a saviour to Springfield couples trying to conceive. Then, he's kidnapped to help conceive a thoroughbred racehorse.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Brick Like Me
programme.desc: Homer wakes up in a world where his family and everyone in Springfield are made of Legos. Can he 'put together' how he got there and figure out how to get home before he's stuck in a world of bricks forever?

programme.title: The Simpsons: Pay Pal
programme.desc: Marge swears off befriending any more couples when Homer offends their charming new British neighbours. But when Lisa declares that she, too, doesn't need friends, Marge reconsiders.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Clown in the Dumps
programme.desc: The unthinkable happens: a Springfield resident dies. Also, Krusty retires after he's offended by a comedy cable channel roast of him, and Lisa tries to protect Homer from getting hurt.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Wreck of the Relationship
programme.desc: When Bart disrespects Homer's authority, Homer makes a point to try his hand at parenting. This proves fruitless, so Marge signs them up for the Relation Ship, where they’ll resolve their conflicts at sea.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXV
programme.desc: On the annual spooktacular Halloween special, Bart and Lisa are transported to a demon-filled alternate universe after Bart reads a set of Aramaic symbols he finds on the underside of his desk.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Opposites A-Frack
programme.desc: Lisa brings in Assemblywoman Maxine Lombard to put a stop to Mr. Burns' fracking operation, but is taken aback when the two political opponents find themselves attracted to one another.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Simpsorama
programme.desc: 'Futurama's' Planet Express crew comes to present-day Springfield to prevent the Simpsons from destroying the future.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Blazed and Confused
programme.desc: Bart faces a tough test at school when he gets a new teacher, Mr. Lassen, who vows to crush his spirit.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Covercraft
programme.desc: Homer has a mid-life crisis, takes up bass guitar and forms a cover band with some of the other dads in town. But the band's modest early success is soon overwhelmed by the breakout potential of their most unlikely star, Apu.

programme.title: The Simpsons: I Won't Be Home for Christmas
programme.desc: After Moe convinces Homer to stay out drinking on Christmas Eve, Marge tells Homer not to come home. This leads to Homer's sad trek through lonely Springfield, where he learns that the only place where one should truly get drunk on Christmas is home.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Man Who Came to Be Dinner
programme.desc: During a trip to 'Dizzneeland' the Simpsons board the wrong ride, Rocket To Your Doom, and are transported through the galaxy to Kang and Kodos’ home planet, where they are held captive at the local zoo.

programme.title: Family Guy: Absolutely Babulous
programme.desc: When Stewie receives a participation medal in his school's toddler games, he begins to question everything he has ever won. Meanwhile, Peter causes a fight between Lois' parents and must repair the damage he caused.

programme.title: Family Guy: Short Cuts
programme.desc: When Brian accidentally becomes a local hero, an old street pal and now a successful millionaire dog reaches out and tries to convince him to get neutered. Meanwhile, Lois gets a pixie cut against Peter's wishes.

programme.title: Archer: Archer Vice: Palace Intrigue: Part I
programme.desc: Archer and the rest of the ISIS gang are the guests of Gustavo Calderon and his wife Juliana. Calderon is a big fan of Cherlene, but Juliana is a bigger fan of Archer.

programme.title: Archer: Archer Vice: Palace Intrigue: Part II
programme.desc: Archer tries to keep his fling with the dictator's wife a secret while Krieger bonds with his clone brothers.

programme.title: Movie: Alpha
programme.desc: A young man injured and left for dead during the last ice age struggles to survive in a hostile world. After fighting off a pack of wolves, he nurses one of the injured animals back to health and forms a lasting bond with it that changes history.

programme.title: Movie: Snatched
programme.desc: After her boyfriend dumps her on the eve of their exotic vacation, Emily convinces her cautious mother to go with her. Polar opposites, they are forced to get over their differences as mother and daughter when they are kidnapped by a dangerous group.

programme.title: Movie: Trainwreck
programme.desc: A commitment-phobic magazine writer is surprised to find her interest going beyond a one-night stand when she goes out with a nice-guy sports doctor on whom she's writing an article.

programme.title: Movie: The Simpsons Movie
programme.desc: Homer's actions cause a leak of radioactive material from the Nuclear Plant into the river. Homer has to try and fix the problem before Springfield can no longer be saved.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: The Ring (But Not Scary)
programme.desc: Bob's plan to surprise Linda for their anniversary gets tricky when the kids become involved.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Motor, She Boat
programme.desc: Tina and Bob participate in the Thundergirls father-daughter cardboard boat race and Tina tries to hide her feelings about Bob’s terrible boat-building skills. Meanwhile, Linda drags Louise and Gene to a fire station open house and overstays her welcome.

programme.title: Movie: Mission: Impossible III
programme.desc: Former IMF agent Ethan Hunt is on a new mission. He must rescue a fellow agent from dangerous arms dealer Owen Davian. Hunt must rely on a new cast of agents and some old friends to help save the day.

programme.title: Movie: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: American spy agent Ethan Hunt falls under false suspicion of disloyalty and must expose the real spy without the help of his organization.

programme.title: Movie: Mission: Impossible II
programme.desc: IMF agent Ethan Hunt must go to Australia to destroy a disease created by a terrorist group made to wipe out and infect the world.

programme.title: Movie: Mission: Impossible III
programme.desc: Former IMF agent Ethan Hunt is on a new mission. He must rescue a fellow agent from dangerous arms dealer Owen Davian. Hunt must rely on a new cast of agents and some old friends to help save the day.

programme.title: Hidden Habitats: Monterey Bay
programme.desc: Explore the marine ecosystem of the Monterey Bay, California where a giant kelp forest hosts one of the most diverse ecologies in the world.

programme.title: The Polar Bear Family and Me: Spring
programme.desc: Wildlife cameraman Gordon Buchanan travels to Norway's Svalbard archipelago, where he meets, tracks and hunkers down with a family of polar bears.

programme.title: The Polar Bear Family and Me: Summer
programme.desc: Gordon finds that things have not gotten easier for the polar bears when he returns to Svalbard in the summer.

programme.title: The Polar Bear Family and Me: Autumn
programme.desc: Lyra is struggling to care for her cub while fighting off starvation in Autumn.

programme.title: South Pacific: Ocean of Islands
programme.desc: How the South Pacific islands has affected human culture.

programme.title: South Pacific: Castaways
programme.desc: Learn how some of the most isolated islands became habited.

programme.title: South Pacific: Endless Blue
programme.desc: Much of the South Pacific is a marine desert, but some areas support diverse life. Following how the ocean creatures survive the harsh conditions they live in.

programme.title: South Pacific: Ocean of Volcanoes
programme.desc: The birth, growth and death of an island in the South Pacific.

programme.title: South Pacific: Strange Islands
programme.desc: On the isolated islands of the South Pacific, wildlife has evolved in extraordinary ways, but island living may carry a high price because when new species arrive, all hell breaks loose.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: North America
programme.desc: In winter, lynx prowl the Yukon for snowshoe hares and manatees seek hot springs to escape the freeze. In summer, Tennessee fish build spectacular underwater pyramids, fireflies light up the forest's nights, and polar bears leap from rocks as they hunt.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: South America
programme.desc: A look at the most species rich continent on Earth: South America. In the Andes, pumas hunt guanaco while rarely seen bears search for mini avocados. In the Amazon, poison dart frogs care for their babies and colourful macaws eat clay.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Asia
programme.desc: Visit the planet's largest continent. In the frozen north, walrus congregate in extraordinary numbers, bears gather inside volcanoes and yeti-like monkeys fight in the remote forests of China. In the tropical south, the last few Sumatran rhino roam.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Europe
programme.desc: Europe is where wildlife survives alongside people. In Gibraltar, a baby monkey is kidnapped, while in the cemeteries of Vienna grave robbing wild hamsters fight. In this fairy tale continent wolves roam the forests and dragons lurk in caves.

programme.title: 9/ 11: Voices From the Air
programme.desc: Authentic transmissions from on-board stewardesses, chilling voicemails from victims and never-before-seen interviews provide a groundbreaking insight into what really happened on this ill-fated day.

programme.title: Inside 9/ 11
programme.desc: A look at the time line that led up to the deadly attacks including Al Qaeda's roots.

programme.title: George W. Bush: The 9/ 11 Interview
programme.desc: Taped over the course of a two-day interview, George W. Bush opens up with candid details and personal experiences on the gruelling hours and pressure-packed days following the attacks.

programme.title: How It's Made: Escalators, Kevlar Canoes, Marble Cheddar, Disc Music Boxes
programme.desc: See how escalators, Kevlar canoes, marble cheddar, and disc music boxes are made.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Alien Ice Towers
programme.desc: When strange towers of ice are found growing from in a barren, water-starved desert, experts speculate why these structures have uncanny similarities to extraterrestrial formations recently discovered on Pluto's alien landscape.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Island of Arctic Cannibals
programme.desc: Three graves are discovered on the frozen beach of an uninhabited Arctic island, and the mummified corpses inside may answer a centuries-old mystery of an expedition that was literally consumed by the cannibalistic insanity of its mutinous crew.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Revenge of the Zombie Killer
programme.desc: Experts make a chilling new discovery when they unearth a 30,000-year-old zombie virus from an icy grave. If this ancient disease is successfully resuscitated back to life, it could cause a catastrophic global calamity.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Curse of the Ice Princess
programme.desc: After a 2,500-year-old mummy is discovered in Siberia, locals report strange, cataclysmic events that point to an ancient curse; using cutting-edge archaeology, experts reveal who this person was and if they've unleashed something sinister.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Mystery of Skeleton Lake
programme.desc: A frozen lake deep in the Himalayas melts once a year to expose hundreds of human bones and a centuries-old mystery of astonishing carnage, leaving experts to speculate if it was a single catastrophic event or something much more sinister.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Ghost Ship of the Damned
programme.desc: A long-lost treasure map claims to know the whereabouts of a missing ship buried with gold and silver in the California desert, and using cutting-edge technology, a team of experts use this new evidence to get close to a game-changing discovery.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Curse of Superstition Mountains
programme.desc: New discoveries at the site of an alleged long-lost gold mine could lead investigators to a 200-million-dollar payday, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate clues in long-lost maps and relics to recover the Lost Dutchman's treasure.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Knights Templar in America
programme.desc: Mysterious new evidence suggests the Knights Templar fled Europe and rebuilt their fearsome warrior order in the Americas a century before Columbus, and experts use cutting-edge tech to investigate if long-lost relics confirm this game-changing theory.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Killing Meriwether Lewis
programme.desc: Meriwether Lewis was the man who teamed with William Clark to map the lands west of the Mississippi, but he died in mysterious circumstances. Experts reveal a vast conspiracy that could prove that one of America's greatest explorers was murdered.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Mystery of the American Maya
programme.desc: New evidence suggests the Maya civilization did not suddenly vanish, but that they instead still survived, they just resettled in the United States. Using cutting-edge tech, experts reveal what really happened to these long-lost people.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Hunt for the Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: New clues taken from long-lost maps offer fresh leads in the hunt for the Ark of the Covenant, and using the latest hi-tech archaeological methods, experts retrace its steps through the Holy Land, Egypt, and Ethiopia to make a game-changing discovery.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Egypt's Land of the Gods
programme.desc: New evidence from one of the world's oldest maps offers clues to a long-lost civilization of untold treasure, and this cutting-edge expedition might finally prove that this mysterious kingdom is the ancestral home of the ancient Egyptians.

programme.title: See No Evil: Loretta's Last Valentine
programme.desc: On February 14th, 2014, pregnant college student Loretta Saunders vanishes without trace. Her trail runs cold after she is spotted on CCTV at her apartment building. The race is now on to find her before it's too late.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Girl on the Bus
programme.desc: In the dead of winter, a 14-year-old girl vanishes without a trace on her way to school. Her parents have no idea where she could be. Investigators follow a trail of surveillance footage, but are unsure if they will find her before its too late.

programme.title: See No Evil: Come Home Sierra
programme.desc: 15-year-old Sierra LaMar leaves for school like any other day, only to disappear without a trace. Surveillance footage helps reveal if she is just another typical runaway or if something a lot worse happens to Sierra.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Last Ride Home
programme.desc: A wealthy labour lawyer shoots his high profile wife from the back seat of a car, and questions are raised about whether it was an accident or plain murder.

programme.title: The Lost Boys of Bucks County
programme.desc: When four young men mysteriously disappear from Bucks County, Pennsylvania, the entire nation is left wondering what became of them. Police join forces and follow the clues, leading them straight to a troubled killer with no regard for human life.

programme.title: The Lost Boys of Bucks County
programme.desc: When four young men mysteriously disappear from Bucks County, Pennsylvania, the entire nation is left wondering what became of them. Police join forces and follow the clues, leading them straight to a troubled killer with no regard for human life.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Alaskan Temptress
programme.desc: A Washington community is shocked when PTA mom, Mechele Linehan is arrested for murder from a decade earlier in Alaska. Details of a seedy and sordid past emerge. But is this suburban mother a cold-blooded temptress or has she been wrongly accused?

programme.title: The Lost Boys of Bucks County
programme.desc: When four young men mysteriously disappear from Bucks County, Pennsylvania, the entire nation is left wondering what became of them. Police join forces and follow the clues, leading them straight to a troubled killer with no regard for human life.

programme.title: The Lost Boys of Bucks County
programme.desc: When four young men mysteriously disappear from Bucks County, Pennsylvania, the entire nation is left wondering what became of them. Police join forces and follow the clues, leading them straight to a troubled killer with no regard for human life.

programme.title: American Monster: Just Out of Frame
programme.desc: A fun-loving couple, both business-owners, share a close relationship with their grown daughters. So when the mother is found gruesomely bludgeoned to death in her own home, no one suspects the unthinkable. But unlike guilty people, video doesn't lie.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Resident Evil
programme.desc: Investigating the strange tale of two double murders, five years apart, that shook two quiet Omaha neighbourhoods and led police to an unlikely suspect.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Innocence Interrupted
programme.desc: The murders of a teenage boy who never returns home from school and a teenage girl who is ambushed as she sits in a car with friends devastate their communities.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: The Dangerous Houses
programme.desc: 18-year-old Brookelyn Farthing disappears in 2013 after attending a party in the small town of Berea, Kentucky. And then, 24-year-old Lindsay Buziak, a young beautiful realtor, is found brutally killed after showing some new clients a million-dollar home.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Killers Among Us?
programme.desc: A respected police officer heads home after a late shift, and a young man who has just moved into his own place relaxes after watching football. Both of these seemingly routine evenings turn deadly.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Her Last Night Out
programme.desc: They head out into the night, full of youthful life and promise, but they never come back. Now, clues from behind bars may help solve the mysteries that surround the disturbing disappearances of two women.

programme.title: Shattered: False Prophet
programme.desc: 1994. Middle River, MD. Christmas Day. A murder rocks a family's Christmas celebration... a mother prepares a holiday dinner for a son who never arrives... and a detective unearths a dark secret that shatters a town's faith.

programme.title: Shattered: Requiem for Murder
programme.desc: In 1992, when a woman in Harrisburg, Pennsylvania is attacked, police eye a local family man as the suspect. But one detective thinks everyone's got it all wrong: this attack isn't a one-off - it's the work of a serial killer.

programme.title: Shattered: Seven and a Half Minutes
programme.desc: Mid 1980's. A District Attorney in Wichita Falls, Texas has multiple gruesome homicides to solve. A father's grief provokes him to meet his daughter's killer face to face, and over 100 miles away, a husband is accused of the murder of his wife.

programme.title: Shattered: The Pact
programme.desc: In 1990, a teenage boy vanishes. Nearly two decades later, there's still no trace of him, dead or alive. It's a mother's worst nightmare, but one detective refuses to stop looking until he's able to solve this mystery.

programme.title: Living a Nightmare: Deadly Message
programme.desc: A young man who overcame a devastating brain injury enters a taxi and never resurfaces. Police are at a loss until they receive a mysterious text that pivots the case in a new direction and intensifies the race to bring Julian Williams home alive.

programme.title: Living a Nightmare: The Long Way Home
programme.desc: A blood-stained bicycle hidden in an Ohio cornfield sets the stage for an unspeakable crime. While police race to find missing college student Sierah Joughin, a vicious predator lurks somewhere in the rural, Midwestern countryside.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: Chase Me
programme.desc: A 50-year-old woman is found dead in her home. All that's left behind is a note that reads, 'Chase me.' But when detectives uncover the killer, they quickly discover they have come face to face with a remorseless psychopath.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: Into the Woods at Midnight
programme.desc: Residents of a quaint village are terrified when a local innkeeper and two others are found brutally murdered. Detectives in Maine must follow the depraved killer into the woods at night as he leads them to where he killed and buried his fourth victim.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: I'm Not the Monster I Was
programme.desc: An unapologetic 14-year-old boy confesses to the murder of his best friend. Twelve years later, he's back in court with chance at a reduced sentence.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: Where Evil Grows
programme.desc: A charming 20-year-old wants to help authorities with a murder investigation. He claims to have met one of the three victims and says he has no knowledge of the crime, but detectives suspect otherwise.

programme.title: American Monster: Home Video Hit
programme.desc: A typical American family isn't exactly what it seems. In public, Max and Janeene Jones appear to have the perfect marriage, but behind this happy image lies hidden truths. 20 years later, an undercover police investigation reveals an unexpected killer.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: UFOs in the Past and Present
programme.desc: From the lore and history of ancient Egypt, to the myths of Native Americans, and even the art of the Renaissance period, mankind's past is riddled with the evidence of UFOs.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Deathbed Confessions
programme.desc: Deathbed confessions could provide real evidence of the existence of UFOs. The truth about alien contact is not limited to the military, and in fact, many believe such secrets extend well into outer space, even on Mars itself.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Two Homes in Mexico
programme.desc: Gonzolo Martinez is a 17-year old gang member, sentenced to 48 years in prison. A chance arises, and Martinez escapes to Mexico and becomes a drug dealer. Only when Martinez tries to cross the border, do the feds get their chance to capture him.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Make You a Superstar
programme.desc: A scam artist conned aspiring artists out of millions. A modern day Bonnie and Clyde eluded police until a slip-up led to their doorstep.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Murder My Own Family
programme.desc: James Wiley was given a life sentence after killing his step-mom and three young brothers.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Get Revenge
programme.desc: Scott Eizember has a temper and a history of abuse. So when his girlfriend dumps him, Scott wants revenge. He goes on a violent spree, but is injured during his pursuit.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Fetch a Hooker
programme.desc: Lane Slettvet, a muscle man for a drug dealer, liked to test fate. One night on a job to pick up a prostitute, Slettvet stabs a man. He tries to stay under the radar, but still goes to parties for the drugs.

programme.desc: James Wiley was given a life sentence after killing his step-mom and three young brothers.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Deathbed Confessions
programme.desc: Deathbed confessions could provide real evidence of the existence of UFOs. The truth about alien contact is not limited to the military, and in fact, many believe such secrets extend well into outer space, even on Mars itself.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Tet Offensive
programme.desc: During the infamous Tet Offensive of 1968, an elite band of US Special Operations troops are called in to rescue dozens of helpless civilians trapped in the border town of Chau Doc, which has been captured by an overwhelming Viet Cong invasion force.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Search and Destroy
programme.desc: In a battle known as the Nine Days in May, the troops of the US 4th Infantry Division are on a search and destroy mission in Vietnam's Central Highlands when they run headlong into a massive force of North Vietnamese soldiers on the Cambodian border.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Road to Baghdad
programme.desc: See the shot by shot firefights in the 21 day bloody battle for Baghdad from the warrior's point of view.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Real Mary Magdalene
programme.desc: A look at the story of Mary Magdalene, a key figure in Christianity.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Dark Truths of the Templars
programme.desc: Templar fact and fiction have become blurred by their depictions in book and on film. However, we present a very different picture that challenges head on the orthodox beliefs about an order that angered much of Europe, particularly France.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Inventions
programme.desc: From the mass production of life-saving Penicillin and pioneering Plastic Surgery, to the development of the Internet and GPS, this episode uses rare archive footage and expert interviews to identify and rank the most influential inventions of warfare.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Weapons
programme.desc: The story of warfare in the modern age, from the legendary Spitfire to the stealth bombers of Iraq.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Aircraft
programme.desc: Find out about aircraft important to conflicts in the 20th and 21st centuries.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Battles
programme.desc: With incredible archive from the heart of the action, and interviews with world-leading historians, this action-packed episode counts down the most decisive battles of warfare that have been caught on camera.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Vessels
programme.desc: This episode ranks the most iconic vessels of warfare of the last century. Featuring the German U-Boat, the Nimitz Aircraft Carriers, and the world's most successful battleship, these vessels have changed the face of warfare.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Beheading the Taliban
programme.desc: In Afghanistan in 2006, US Army Green Berets take on nearly 1000 Taliban fighters in one of the most intense battles of the War on Terror. Five years after the 9/ 11 attacks, Task Force 31 launches a full-scale attack on a hill called Sperwan Ghar.

programme.desc: On the morning of the Playcare bake sale, Bob is devastated when he can't make his "Big Apple" pie because he's out of apples. Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to find their favorite television host's special sweater in time for his show.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy's Super Wish
programme.desc: Goofy wishes he could be a super-hero so that he can help out his friends.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Super Goof's Super Puzzle
programme.desc: In order to help his friends solve a puzzle, Goofy uses his alter-ego 'Super Goof'.

programme.title: Bluey: Wagon Ride / Taxi / The Beach
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo take a wagon ride with their Dad to the park; Bluey has a taxi service with her Dad as her first passenger; Bluey tries to catch up to her Mum on the beach.

programme.title: Bluey: Mum and Dads / Mount Mumandad / Asparagus
programme.desc: Rusty and Indy have a disagreement; Bluey and Bingo pretend Mum and Dad are a mountain; Dad teaches Bluey table manners.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Agent Double-O-Goof/ Egg-xasperating!
programme.desc: While everyone prepares for the Queen of England to come for tea, Goofy is mistaken for a secret agent in charge of delivering a top-secret briefcase. The Happy Helpers are charged with watching Clara Cluck's egg while she runs errands.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Bed, Breakfast and Bungled!
programme.desc: The Happy Helpers try to help a Bed and Breakfast, but Clarabelle's excitement causes problems.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald the Genie
programme.desc: Donald becomes a genuine magical genie and realizes it is not as easy as it sounds when he is only able to grant one wish to each Clubhouse friend.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald's Ducks
programme.desc: Donald volunteers to help a group of ducks get to a warm beach for their winter retreat.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Treasure Hunt
programme.desc: Mickey convinces his friends to search for a treasure because he believes there is one.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Pluto's Dinosaur Romp
programme.desc: When Professor Von Drake's Tick-Tock Time Machine lets a little dinosaur named Baby Dinah loose in the Clubhouse Carnival, Mickey and pals travel back in time to return Baby Dinah to her prehistoric home .

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy's Goofbot
programme.desc: Goofy needs some help building his toy robot for today's Toy Fair.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Missing Space Rock / Flying Factory Out of Control
programme.desc: Newton thinks Owlette stole a precious asteroid – but she’s been framed by Romeo. Romeo needs the PJs' help bringing his Flying Factory under control, but they don't trust him.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Search and Rescue / Over the Dog Park Wall
programme.desc: Two puppies who love to have fun take on adventures around their neighbourhood.

programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to find a special balloon for Keia's birthday party. When the pugs' cousin, Cody, goes missing during a game of hide-and-seek, Bingo and Rolly must find him before his family comes to pick him up.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: The Karate Cub/Don't Over Duet
programme.desc: Fozzie must learn some 'Camilla-rate' in order to join the martial arts team, The Kickin' Chickens. Piggy practices her performance for Miss Nanny too hard and loses her voice!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Mickey's Roommate/ Minnie's Bow-tel!
programme.desc: When Pete needs a place to crash, Mickey offers to let him stay at his place. Unfortunately, Pete is the worst roommate ever! The Happy Helpers redecorate Mr. Doozy's hotel.

programme.title: Bluey: Bus / Mum School / Piggyback
programme.desc: The adventures of Bluey, a loveable puppy who lives with her parents and little sister.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Leave It to Beavers/ Counting Sheep
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly try to build a dam to protect their doghouse from a rainstorm. When Bob says he'll 'count sheep' to sleep, the pugs herd a flock of sheep into the backyard to help.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Bird Beard / The Royal Egg Hunt
programme.desc: Two puppies who love to have fun take on adventures around their neighbourhood.

programme.desc: When Queen Shanti's lost jewelry suddenly turns up, Mira enlists the Queen to join her on the case. Mira asks her friend Pinky, the goat expert, to help find Dhruv's pet goat.

programme.title: Bluey: Army / Fancy Restaurant / Stumpfest
programme.desc: The adventures of Bluey, a loveable puppy who lives with her parents and little sister.

programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly try to cheer Hissy up by taking her to their favourite places. Later, A.R.F. is reprogrammed to take the pugs where they want, but not being them back.

programme.desc: A tenacious penguin and a kind hearted flamingo train to be delivery birds.

programme.desc: When Bob wants to meet someone from space, the pugs go to a gathering of UFO enthusiasts. When the pups find a doggie toy that isn't theirs, they go on a mission to find its owner.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Suitcase Switcheroo / More Cowbell for Bob
programme.desc: When Bob mixes up his suitcase with another traveler, the pugs head to Spain on a mission to retrieve it. Then, Bob can't find his signature instrument for the reunion of his high school rock band.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: One Unicorny Day!/ The Happy Horse Helpers!
programme.desc: When a horse gets a traffic cone stuck on her head and is sprayed with sparkly paint, the townsfolk think they've seen a real unicorn.

programme.desc: Mickey and his friends plan to surprise Donald with a waffle breakfast for his birthday. Minnie's nieces, Millie and Melody, visit the Happy Helpers office for the day.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Daddy Delivery/ Junior Flyer JP
programme.desc: While Pip and Freddy make a delivery on Father's Day, a baby Hedgehog gets stuck atop a hill and is too afraid to come down. Pip and Freddy help JP become a Super Duper Flier again after he gets demoted for failing to take a test.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Mid-Air Care / The Itsy Bitsy Baby
programme.desc: A tenacious penguin and a kind hearted flamingo train to be delivery birds.

programme.desc: Bluey and her friends want to play a game of 'Shops'; Bluey and her family take a trip to the pool; The family plays with hand puppets.

programme.desc: Wanda and her sister Blonda switch bodies; Mark the Alien is missing Flarg on his planet.

programme.desc: Mark Chang has to be protected from a forced wedding; Timmy's on a bad wishmaking streak.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: The story of a young boy who needs help and the two magical fairies that come to his aid.

programme.desc: Timmy wishes his life could be like an action movie, and that he could know everything.

programme.desc: A kid known for being polite and nice finds himself unable to contain his inner thoughts, after putting on a strange pair of VR glasses.

programme.desc: Lola and Lana try out for Bluebell Scouts but discover one of them might be more suited for it. When Lincoln and Clyde think Bobby is cheating on Lori they follow him around town gathering evidence.

programme.title: The Loud House: No Laughing Matter/ No Spoilers
programme.desc: When Luan overhears her siblings complaining about her comedy, she decides to give it up. Knowing Leni's history of spoiling surprises, the kids don't tell her about Mom's upcoming party.

programme.title: The Loud House: Legends/ Mall of Duty
programme.desc: Dad and Lincoln get on 'Legends of the Hidden Temple' and are excited for a day of bonding. Lincoln wants to go to the mall and has to bring his sisters along.

programme.title: The Loud House: No Such Luck/ Frog Wild
programme.desc: The sisters think Lincoln is bad luck so they ban him from attending their activities. When Lincoln finds out his class is dissecting frogs, he and Lana embark on a mission to rescue them.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Arr in the Family/ Finders Weepers
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne wants to help CJ to get onstage at a Pirate Dinner Show. Then, Ronnie and Sid decide whether to take money from a lost coin purse they found at the mercado.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Crying Dame/ Anti Social
programme.desc: To get Lily to stop crying the kids give her an old singing toy from the attic but it quickly drives them crazy. Dad declares war on the kids' devices so they decide to show him how great they are.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Hall Monitor/ Jellyfish Jam
programme.desc: SpongeBob is the hall monitor at boating school; Bob takes a jellyfish home.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Lost Mattress/ Krabs vs. Plankton
programme.desc: Bob buys Mr. Krabs a new mattress; Plankton sues Mr. Krabs for failing to post a warning.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Good Krabby Name/ Move It or Lose It
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick advertise the Krusty Krab. Then, petitions are circulated to see which restaurant will get bulldozed.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patrick! The Game/ The Sewers of Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: Patrick invents a new boardgame. Later, SpongeBob and Squidward flush Mr. Krabs' safe and must go into the sewers to find it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Kenny the Cat/ Yeti Crabs
programme.desc: SpongeBob will do anything to get to meet his newest hero, Kenny the Cat.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Goodbye, Krabby Patty?
programme.desc: Squidward must make Patrick and SpongeBob friends again after they learn that sponges and sea stars aren't ususally friends.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Extreme Sports/ Squirrel Record
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick try to join the extreme sports team the Drasticals. Also, Sandy finds a book of world's records and tries to break them all with SpongeBob's help.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Tentacle-vision/ I Heart Dancing
programme.desc: Squidward gets a TV show. / SpongeBob has a dance audition.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Goo Goo Gas/ Le Big Switch
programme.desc: Plankton creates a gas that turns everyone at the Krusty Krab into babies. After being enrolled in a cooks exchange program, SpongeBob switches places with a snooty French chef from a high-end restaurant.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Snowball Effect
programme.desc: SpongeBob's good intentions and overzealous nature create chaos in an underwater city.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: New Student Starfish/ Clams
programme.desc: Pat joins SpongeBob at boating school; Mr. Krabs takes Bob and Squid fishing.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sharks vs. Pods/ CopyBob DittoPants
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets in over his head with the Sharks. Plankton creates an evil clone of SpongeBob.

programme.desc: Spongebob becomes popular at the Krusty Krab; Spongebob helps Patrick get radio play.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Whale of a Birthday/ Karate Island
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs wants to give his daughter the best birthday ever. SpongeBob is assigned the task of finding out what she would like; SpongeBob is invited to a karate competition on the mysterious Karate Island.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: New Digs/ Krabs a la Mode
programme.desc: SpongeBob moves into the Krusty Krab and turns it into an ice skating rink.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krusty Towers/ Mrs. Puff, You're Fired
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs turns the Krusty Krabs into Krusty Towers, an upscale hotel where the customer is king, even the most obnoxious and demanding ones. This pushes Squidward to the point of quitting and returning as a guest to make a series of outrageous requests.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: TCRI
programme.desc: After breaking into TCRI headquarters, the Turtles discover the true intent of the Kraang and try to stop them once and for all.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Cockroach Terminator
programme.desc: As the Turtles try to foil a Kraang invasion plot, they are hunted by a giant, indestructible cockroach.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Baxter's Gambit
programme.desc: Baxter Stockman takes revenge on both Fishface and the Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Enemy of My Enemy
programme.desc: After witnessing the Kraang in action, Karai comes to realize the seriousness of an alien threat and approaches the Turtles to propose an alliance.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Karai's Vendetta
programme.desc: While the Turtles are infiltrating an undersea Kraang base, the Foot Clan attempts to capture April, forcing her to fend for herself in a battle of wits against Karai.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Pulverizer Returns
programme.desc: When Shredder schemes to create a fearsome army of mutants, the Turtles have no choice but to rely on the help of the newest recruit to the Foot Clan: The Pulverizer!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Parasitica
programme.desc: Michelangelo must save his brothers after they fall under the control of a parasitic wasp.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Operation: Break Out
programme.desc: Donatello breaks into a secret Kraang detention center in order to rescue Kirby O'Neil. But when he discovers they are trapped inside with a deadly mutant prisoner, he realizes that breaking in was the easy part.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Brittany the Body Snatcher/ Agent Smith
programme.desc: When Alvin notices Brittany being nice to him he's sure an alien has taken over her body. In order to earn a job on the school newspaper, Alvin helps Simon uncover the biggest story the school's ever seen.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Allergic Reaction/ Lice-enced to Teach
programme.desc: Theodore develops an allergy to an unknown ingredient; Jeanette and the Chipmunks try to rescue a chimpanzee Bocarter keeps in a cage.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Munk Man/ Ride Along
programme.desc: Simon creates a Super Hero costume for a convention he's attending. When Alvin's bicycle is stolen, he joins forces with Officer Dangus to solve the case.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Animal House Party/ Lice-enced to Teach
programme.desc: A wild party is planned when the brothers are set to be alone for the weekend; the friends orchestrate a break-in to rescue a chimpanzee.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Space Invaders, Part 2

programme.title: Henry Danger: Double Date Danger
programme.desc: When Miss Shapen's niece, Noelle, comes into town and chooses Jasper over Henry, Henry discovers that Noelle has much bigger plans than just going out to dinner with Jasper.

programme.title: Henry Danger: License to Fly
programme.desc: Ray agrees to let Henry fly his helicopter, but it's too much for Ray when he starts to act like a nervous parent. Charlotte, Jasper, and Piper find a cotton candy machine in Junk-N-Stuff and start making cotton candy.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Swellview's Got Talent

programme.desc: When Captain Man and Kid Danger find out that an astronaut from Swellview has been taken hostage aboard the Space Station, they use Schwoz's 'love shuttle' to blast off into space.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Danger Games

programme.title: The American Game
programme.desc: College football has evolved in so many transformative ways. All throughout its history, the sport's constant evolutions have had common threads, with officials and coaches striving to make it safer, more exciting and more entertaining.

programme.title: The Greatest: Mascots
programme.desc: In college football, mascots are an unlikely piece of serious business. These are the top 11 live animals, cartoon creations, and everything in between, in a fun breakdown of one of the sport's most enjoyable traditions.

programme.title: The American Game: The Culture
programme.desc: College football is more than just a sport – it's a cultural phenomenon. To understand the game, you have to understand how much everything around it matters too – from the team colors to the uniforms to the bands, the mascots and more.

programme.title: The American Game: Integration
programme.desc: As much as any other sport, the history of college football tells the history of American race relations. You can't appreciate the sport's complexities without knowing how long the road has been, and continues to be, towards equal rights.

programme.desc: A high school senior life is shattered when her mother dies, but her hip and young cousin does whatever it takes to turn her life around.
