programme.title: How It Really Happened: Did Scott Peterson Murder Laci?
programme.desc: A tale of murder, adultery, courtroom drama, and ultimately the death penalty. The story of Scott and Laci Peterson as told by those who lived it.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Yosemite Murders: The Missing Women (Part 1)
programme.desc: When in 1999, young women mysteriously disappear from Yosemite National Park, investigators determine foul play and a prime suspect emerges, then escapes.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Yosemite Murders: The Evil Side (Part 2)
programme.desc: The key suspect in the murder of young women in Yosemite National Park is caught, but it’s up to an exceptionally skilled FBI agent to dismantle his web of lies and denials to draw a confession.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Last Dance
programme.desc: Evidence tells investigators that a woman was thrown over the side of a bridge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Constructive Critcism
programme.desc: When a man is found dead, having been stabbed 46 times, and police are stuck sifting through the DNA. After an arduous search, they find their killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sworded Scheme
programme.desc: A college student goes missing, and investigators discover blood spatter in her boyfriend’s bedroom. Blood spatter someone has gone to great lengths to conceal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unmasked
programme.desc: A serial rapist was on the loose in a Texas town. No one knew where he'd strike next, but the audacity of his attacks and the escalation of violence against his victims made finding him imperative.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Ties
programme.desc: An esteemed couple is brutally attacked in their home, leaving one dead and the other gravely injured. The survivor identifies the killer but recants her admission leaving investigators probing for answers. A DNA hit captures the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trouble Brewing
programme.desc: A high-priced call girl is murdered on the outskirts of Columbia, SC, and find that a six-pack of beer may be their only link to the person responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sharper Image
programme.desc: After a girl was killed, investigators learn that cutting-edge technologies from NASA prove that the arrested suspect was not the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insulated Evidence
programme.desc: A young college student is found strangled and badly burned. Investigators get a break when a trace evidence expert uncovers the murder weapon in the spool of a vacuum.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Room With a View
programme.desc: The victim had been stabbed more than a hundred times and her bedroom was soaked with blood. While her body was positioned in a suggestive way, she hadn't been sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dollars and Sense
programme.desc: Even though the victim was burned beyond recognition, police were able to create a composite sketch from his remains and identify him. Investigators still had to determine where he was killed, however, and who wanted him dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Quite a Spectacle
programme.desc: In possibly the strangest case in the history of forensic science, investigators must solve a murder case with a list of evidence consisting entirely of a single squashed tomato left at the crime scene, and tiny reflections of light in a photograph.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Transaction Failed
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone, or if she was the victim of foul play. Investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to find the answers they needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Rebellion
programme.desc: Workers discovered a teen's half-naked body on the side of the road, her throat slit. Police hoped the single foreign hair found in a defensive wound on her thumb would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Crime
programme.desc: Fire rips through a Seattle woman's apartment and some unsettling evidence is found in the rubble. Shortly after, a second fire breaks out just 100 feet from the first, and evidence points to a serial killer whose skills are evolving.

programme.desc: A church thief opts for a crucifix as his tool of choice, an angry lawyer vandalizes a former client and a Dutchman burns down his cell phone store.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Criminals 25
programme.desc: Arsonists manage to torch themselves, a burglar locks himself into the store he's burglarizing, and a bank robber wearing a ski mask waits patiently in line for a teller.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Pumpkin Spice Bride
programme.desc: Comedian Corey Rodrigues' mind is playing tricks on him, Calvin Evans gives up his seat on the bus (then asks for it back), and the hilarious Yamaneika is a maid with no honor at her friend's pumpkin spice-themed wedding.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: The Anti-protest Protest
programme.desc: The always funny Chaunte Wayans is back to reminisce about an old love, and Dave Helem has a run-in with the anti-gluten brigade. Plus, Pretty Ricki's daughter is spilling tea on the entire congregation.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: The Laffs Are Back
programme.desc: Clayton English recalls his nightmare day job and Kira Soltanovich has a screaming match with her toddler son. Plus, Kerry Coddett gets catcalled by a toothless panhandler and Daniel Tirado daydreams about ditching his phone.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: The Inappropriate Barber
programme.desc: Mike Troy muses on GPS, Meshelle provides parenting tips, Cee Jay Craxx recounts a terrible barbershop experience and Paul Elia may be turned down at the pearly gates.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: No. Holds. Barred
programme.desc: It's getting hot and heavy as powerlifting besties battle a couple whose on and off status is ever evolving.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: Dance Moves and Dirty Laundry
programme.desc: Chaos breaks out when two teams of best friends enter the Pepperdome. Sweat will drip, dance moves will bust out, and one shirt will desperately need dry cleaning all for the chance to win $25,000.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Having a Baby
programme.desc: Adam dispels the myth about getting pregnant after 35, delves into breastfeeding vs. formula, and explores postpartum depression for women, and men.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Weight Loss
programme.desc: Adam illustrates all the reasons low-fat diets can actually make you fatter, and why counting calories is a waste of time.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins the Hospital
programme.desc: Inflated hospital costs have created an unfair system, reckless antibiotic prescriptions makes them worthless, and you might not need a mammogram.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Dating
programme.desc: Adam swipes right on knowledge by exposing the flaws in dating sites. Plus, alpha males, and wolves, don't exist, and personality tests are a failure.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Partiers 6
programme.desc: A naked john runs after the prostitute who stole all his clothes, with memories that will linger after the hangover has passed.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Partiers 7
programme.desc: In an ongoing mission to bring bad behavior to light, The Smoking Gun presents 20 of the World's Dumbest Partiers. This week, an upside-down drinking contest leaves everyone doused with beer. Meanwhile, a drunk Russian woman does an impromptu strip tease.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Partiers 9
programme.desc: Featuring a man so drunk and lazy he urinates in his own bed, and then climbs in and goes to sleep. Meanwhile, a group of intoxicated college students snowboard down a flight of stairs.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Performer 11
programme.desc: A rapper whose balance is worse than his rhymes, a flaming embarrassment of a TV chef, a dancer who lost her sexy a long time ago and a weather man with serious arachnophobia.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Ready to Roll

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: A Wild Ride

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: The New Challenge
programme.desc: As a new normal emerges, Dr. Jeff and the Planet Pethood Plus family must rally together to ensure proper care for their animals. With no time to spare, the staff must spring into action when a dog is hit by a car, and a cat suffers from a risky bleed.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: A First for Dr. Jeff

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: The Jackson Six
programme.desc: A loose dog makes a beeline for the highway and Heather and Susan come to the rescue, while the team heads to the mountains to provide free vet care. A litter of abandoned kittens dubbed the 'Jackson 6' are cared for, and a tiger needs help finding love.

programme.desc: Dr. Baier treats a dog who has stopped eating. Dr. Amy tackles complex surgery to help a feisty cat. A Weimaraner with a life-threatening condition needs an urgent procedure. And the team head downtown to run a free vet clinic for the homeless.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Against All Odds

programme.title: North Woods Law: Nothing to Hide
programme.desc: Officer Jim Cyrs and Lt. Saunders rush to the scene of an ATV accident. Officer James Benvenuti works with K-9 Cora to track down a suspect. Officer Eric Hannett gets backup from Lieutenant Bill Boudreau when dealing with a suspicious fisherman.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Over the Edge
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett confront a hunter they suspect illegally shot a pheasant. Officer Egan receives a call from a Canadian hunter who shot a moose that crossed the border. And, a community unites in the search for a missing teenager.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Collision Course
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett track a hunter at an illegal bait site. Officers Towne, Matson and Jones investigate a teenage hunter with a changing story. And a routine patrol in icy conditions becomes a life-changing event for Officer Lucas.

programme.title: North Woods Law: The Hunt Begins
programme.desc: Officer Towne responds to a call about a hunter cornered by a pack of dogs. Officer Hannett tries to coax the truth from suspicious hunters. Lt. Boudreau leads a large night hunting operation that quickly takes an unexpected turn.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Boiling Point
programme.desc: Officer Canfield meets a feisty swimmer looking for a fight. Anger reaches a boiling point when Officers Pushee and McKee ticket a dozen unruly ATV violators at once. And as Officer McKee monitors a sleeping bear, it becomes dangerously aggravated.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Coastal Criminals
programme.desc: Officer James Benvenuti chases down two lobster poachers in Rye. In a puzzling case, Officer Graham Courtney investigates a man on the beach found covered in blood. And Sergeant Adam Cheney attempts to apprehend trespassers on the railroad tracks.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Turkey Trouble

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Trespassers Beware

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Border Bust
programme.desc: Down on the Mexican border, Game Wardens pull in an illegal gill net. A group caught trespassing is found with firearms and narcotics. In East Texas, Game Wardens question a man suspected of illegally hunting on private property.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Finding a Felon
programme.desc: In Texas, Game Wardens are the guardians of the state's wildlife. Game Warden Herchman saves an owl, while Game Wardens Richards and McGee team up to work a case in an archery-only county. Game Wardens Benge and King investigate a poaching case.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Poachers Beware

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: Seaportlandia

programme.title: Movie: Boo! A Madea Halloween

programme.desc: Revived by an underwater electrical cable, Jason Voorhees lays waste to a cruise ship full of traveling teenagers on their way to New York to celebrate their high school graduation.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Potomac: The Wig Easy
programme.desc: Ashley moves forward with baby making plans, while Candiace and Robyn grapple with the decision of revealing Michael's shocking comment from the night before. The ladies head to New Orleans in an effort to learn more about Gizelle.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Potomac: The Big Easy Show Down
programme.desc: Gizelle takes the ladies on an emotional journey to a plantation where her ancestors were enslaved, but the experience is too much for a still grieving Karen to handle. The women hit Bourbon Street for some fun, until Ashley's intentions are questioned.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Potomac: Boundaries, Bayous and Beignets
programme.desc: The ladies wrap up their time in the Big Easy with some enlightening and frightening experiences, but unresolved issues still fester between Ashley and Candiace. Gizelle throws an 80th birthday party for her father and an old flame reappears.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Potomac: Salty Behavior
programme.desc: Monique celebrates her rainbow pregnancy, but the presence of her mother-in-law presents a challenges. Candiace reveals to Gizelle that Monique called Katie a name causing Gizelle to question Monique's behaviour. Ashley and Karen share a spiritual moment.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Potomac: Sex, Lies and Butter Knives
programme.desc: Monique has a breathtaking underwater photo shoot to commemorate her pregnancy, while Karen shows off her sexy dance moves with Ray. Candiace hosts a dinner party where revelations about Michael's alleged secrets are center stage.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Potomac: Days of Our Knives
programme.desc: Robyn finally reveals Michael's secret comment, causing everyone to wonder about the state of the Darby's marriage. Candiace takes her mother to therapy in an effort to fix their relationship, but Dottie's resistance brings Candiace to tears.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Potomac: Showdown at the Hoedown
programme.desc: Robyn confronts Gizelle about throwing her under the bus with Ashley, meanwhile Candiace and Chris have a fight of epic proportions. Katie hosts the ladies at a Potomac hoedown, but breaking news about Michael overshadows the event.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Potomac: Can I Get a Witness?
programme.desc: After feeling like an absentee mom, Gizelle focuses her attention on her daughter Adore. Meanwhile, Candiace and her mother Dorothy try to work on their relationship, but her mom is over Candiace's antics. Ashley decides to go to therapy.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Potomac: Good Will Haunting
programme.desc: With the help of singer Macy Gray, Karen and her daughter record a tribute to her parents. Meanwhile, Robyn plans a haunted house party for Juan's birthday, where an unexpected guest appears. Plus, the charges against Michael are dropped.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Potomac: Opening Old Wounds
programme.desc: With her due date quickly approaching, Monique calls on Chris for help, but his unexpected reaction catches her off guard. Ashley makes the courageous decision to seek out her roots, meanwhile, Katie and her boyfriend spread information about Michael.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Potomac: Open House and Closed Doors
programme.desc: A distant relative's reaction to Ashley leaves her in tears. Dorothy proves old habits die hard, Candiace and her mother are still at odds, and Giselle confronts Monique at Robyn's open house, causing tension between the sisters.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Potomac: Cayman We Get Along?
programme.desc: The ladies head to the beautiful Cayman Islands, but things gets off to a bumpy start when Robyn's lateness finally catches up to her. Meanwhile, Karen and Gizelle get into a hotel lobby showdown that proves to be bigger than the last.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Potomac: Trouble in Paradise
programme.desc: The ladies enjoy a day of adventure in the Cayman Islands. Ashley and Candiace bury their issues over yoga. Robyn decides to confront Gizelle about her behaviour at her open house, catching her fellow green-eyed bandit off guard.

programme.desc: We examine the trail of evidence that suggests that extraterrestrials could be altering human DNA and repopulating the Earth.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Great Flood
programme.desc: Some Ancient Astronaut Theorists believe the Great Flood really happened, and that aliens saved humanity from extinction. Furthermore, that celestial beings are poised to save us again when another catastrophe sweeps across the Earth.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Major League Muscle
programme.desc: Rick looks to turn a 1962 mini-Corvette into a racing ragtop. A 1950s coin operated mustang ride hoofs it into the shop in the hopes that Rick can restore it.

programme.title: Counting Cars: GT Oh My My
programme.desc: Danny turns a 1967 GTO into a world class muscle car and hopes for a monstrous flip. Later, Mike and Roli get in a sticky situation and Danny tries to buy a classic Mercury from an old friend.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Don't Tell Danny
programme.desc: Mike buys a Smart car and wants to trick it out at the shop, but Kevin warns that Danny hates new cars and can't find out about it until it's done. Danny and Kevin go for a spin in Kevin's new Caddy and come across a 1939 Ford.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Sweet Lambo of Mine
programme.desc: Former Guns N' Roses guitarist DJ Ashba arrives at Count's Kustoms in a 2004 Lamborghini Murcielago that he wants turned into the ultimate 'mancar,' but Danny must make sure he includes something special for DJ's wife.

programme.title: Counting Cars: The Full Monte
programme.desc: Inspired by the Rat Rods at a local shop, Danny sends the guys out to find parts for a Count's Kustoms Rat Rod. While on the hunt, Danny gets distracted by a beauty of a Bel Air.

programme.title: Counting Cars: The Count of Monte Carlo
programme.desc: Danny must give up his prized 1972 Monte Carlo for one of his biggest clients and is counting on his team to get the job done in one week. Meanwhile, Ryan and Mike go for the ride of their lives in a 1965 Fastback Mustang.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Zombie Truck
programme.desc: Kevin and Roli make an unplanned stop to check out a mysteriously small vehicle. Later, Danny gets a call from Rob Zombie who wants to customize a truck for his upcoming tour that kicks off in just seven days.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Flamin' and Misbehavin'
programme.desc: Danny wants Ryan to fix a bad flame job on his beloved police cruiser that's been sitting in the shop for years. A customer asks Shannon to restore his 1979 Iron Head Sportster that's more a pile of parts than a bike.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Swap Meet Mayhem
programme.desc: When Danny challenges the guys to come up with innovative money-making ideas for the shop, Shannon proposes building a bike from parts picked up at a swap meet, and Mike ups the ante by challenging Shannon to do it all in one day.

programme.title: Counting Cars: True Fire Fiasco
programme.desc: A memorial bike project poses a series of challenges for the paint team after builder Shannon doesn't get all the necessary information from the customer. Also, Danny stumbles upon a collection of seriously fast rides.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Floodpocalypse Now
programme.desc: Danny tries to score an ex-police motorcycle without getting busted, while a water main break threatens to put the shop permanently under water.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Power and Glory
programme.desc: When Mark asks Danny to build a bike in memory of eight sailors who were lost while serving with him on the USS Belknap, Danny knows he must create something special in their honour. Later, Danny finds a beautiful, rare Corvette in a driveway.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Chevys and Shelbys
programme.desc: Danny and the gang head to the Las Vegas Speedway for Ford Mustang's 50th Anniversary Celebration and the Count gets the rare chance to co-pilot one of Shelby's newest projects.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Pick Ups and Ponies
programme.desc: Danny gets started on a project that he's been waiting a long time to tackle, a 1971 Chevy C10 Pick Up. Later, Danny's bandmate Stoney gets in a fender bender and its Danny to the rescue.

programme.title: Counting Cars: '68 Killer Camaro
programme.desc: A high end client has his heart set on a tricked out '68 Camaro, so Danny sets out to find one and give it the world class Counts Kustoms treatment.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Big Money Bike

programme.title: Counting Cars: The Magic Bus
programme.desc: Danny and the guys get to work transforming a 1960 Volkswagen Bus into a high end luxury beach cruise, but a hiccup may derail the project. Meanwhile, Ryan and Ghetto Bob give a very rare 1963 split window Corvette a wicked facelift.

programme.title: License to Kill: A Match Made in Hell
programme.desc: In order to solidify the secret bond keeping them together, two aids working at a nursing home create a twisted murderous game involving the Alzheimer's patients they care for.

programme.title: Movie: Snatched
programme.desc: After her boyfriend dumps her on the eve of their exotic vacation, Emily convinces her cautious mother to go with her. Polar opposites, they are forced to get over their differences as mother and daughter when they are kidnapped by a dangerous group.

programme.title: Movie: Trainwreck
programme.desc: A commitment-phobic magazine writer is surprised to find her interest going beyond a one-night stand when she goes out with a nice-guy sports doctor on whom she's writing an article.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer's Odyssey
programme.desc: Homer becomes a safety activist when he loses his job for causing an accident at the nuclear plant.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer Defined
programme.desc: Homer accidentally saves the nuclear power plant, becomes a hero and is admired by Lisa.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Burns Verkaufen Der Kraftwerk
programme.desc: Homer's job is in danger when Mr. Burns sells the Springfield Nuclear Power Plant.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Marge Gets a Job
programme.desc: Sparks fly when Marge gets a job at the Springfield Nuclear Power Plant and Mr. Burns promptly falls in love with her.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Last Exit to Springfield
programme.desc: Clueless Homer finds himself filling in for the Springfield Nuclear Power Plant's union leader when it comes time to negotiate their new contract with Mr. Burns.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer the Smithers
programme.desc: When Smithers takes a much-needed vacation, Homer is hired as a temporary replacement. After Homer loses his temper, Mr. Burns tackles some of the basic tasks himself and his newfound independence leaves Smithers jobless.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer's Enemy
programme.desc: Frank Grimes, a man who has had a very difficult life, becomes the new employee at the power plant and quickly clashes with Homer.

programme.title: The Simpsons: C.E. D'Oh
programme.desc: When Homer enrolls in a How to Succeed in Being You course, he gets a new attitude.

programme.title: The Simpsons: American History X-cellent
programme.desc: When the police are called to diffuse a rowdy crowd at Mr. Burns' estate, one of the officers recognizes priceless stolen paintings on the walls, and the maniacal billionaire is taken downtown for questioning.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Them, Robot
programme.desc: Mr. Burns replaces the Springfield Power Plant's employees with robots, but decides to keep Homer as the sole human worker.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Antarctica
programme.desc: Only the strong can survive in Antarctica, the world's most hostile continent. Elephant seals battle for territories, king penguins gather in colonies, and great whales feast on krill bait.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Africa
programme.desc: Even in Africa, home of the greatest wildlife gatherings on Earth, wildlife faces many challenges.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Australia
programme.desc: A land cast adrift at the time of the dinosaurs. Here, kangaroos and wombats brave snowstorms and gum tree forests are filled with never-before-seen predators.

programme.title: Animal Babies: Mountain Babies
programme.desc: Mountain Babies must battle the weather and hungry predators, and just getting around this environment is tough for youngsters. It's a huge adventure and all these trials must be overcome if they are to grow up to become successful adults.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: North America
programme.desc: In winter, lynx prowl the Yukon for snowshoe hares and manatees seek hot springs to escape the freeze. In summer, Tennessee fish build spectacular underwater pyramids, fireflies light up the forest's nights, and polar bears leap from rocks as they hunt.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: South America
programme.desc: A look at the most species rich continent on Earth: South America. In the Andes, pumas hunt guanaco while rarely seen bears search for mini avocados. In the Amazon, poison dart frogs care for their babies and colourful macaws eat clay.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Asia
programme.desc: Visit the planet's largest continent. In the frozen north, walrus congregate in extraordinary numbers, bears gather inside volcanoes and yeti-like monkeys fight in the remote forests of China. In the tropical south, the last few Sumatran rhino roam.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Europe
programme.desc: Europe is where wildlife survives alongside people. In Gibraltar, a baby monkey is kidnapped, while in the cemeteries of Vienna grave robbing wild hamsters fight. In this fairy tale continent wolves roam the forests and dragons lurk in caves.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Antarctica
programme.desc: Only the strong can survive in Antarctica, the world's most hostile continent. Elephant seals battle for territories, king penguins gather in colonies, and great whales feast on krill bait.

programme.title: Animal Babies: Mountain Babies
programme.desc: Mountain Babies must battle the weather and hungry predators, and just getting around this environment is tough for youngsters. It's a huge adventure and all these trials must be overcome if they are to grow up to become successful adults.

programme.title: South Pacific: Ocean of Islands
programme.desc: How the South Pacific islands has affected human culture.

programme.title: South Pacific: Castaways
programme.desc: Learn how some of the most isolated islands became habited.

programme.title: Hidden Habitats: Galapagos
programme.desc: Travel to the most famous archipelago on Earth, the Galapagos. The islands are home bizarre and unique creatures.

programme.title: South Pacific: Fragile Paradise
programme.desc: The South Pacific is still relatively healthy and teeming with fish, but it is a fragile paradise. Discover the insidious threats to these bountiful seas and what is being done to preserve the ocean and its wildlife.

programme.title: South Pacific: Endless Blue
programme.desc: Much of the South Pacific is a marine desert, but some areas support diverse life. Following how the ocean creatures survive the harsh conditions they live in.

programme.title: South Pacific: Ocean of Volcanoes
programme.desc: The birth, growth and death of an island in the South Pacific.

programme.title: South Pacific: Strange Islands
programme.desc: On the isolated islands of the South Pacific, wildlife has evolved in extraordinary ways, but island living may carry a high price because when new species arrive, all hell breaks loose.

programme.title: Hidden Habitats: Serengeti
programme.desc: Take a peek at one of the most famous habitats on Earth the Serengeti. This vast grassland is home to some of the greatest concentrations of herbivores in Africa.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Industry experts and racing drivers come together to give their opinion on new cars.

programme.title: Movie: First Blood
programme.desc: Wandering into a small town, ex-Green Beret John Rambo is targeted, arrested and abused by the local police. When he escapes, Rambo flashes back to his time as a POW and heads into the hills, armed to the teeth and ready to take on those who hunt him.

programme.title: Movie: Rambo: First Blood Part II
programme.desc: Green Beret loner John Rambo is extricated from prison by his former superior Colonel Troutman for a top-secret operation to bring back PoWs still held in Vietnam. Teamed up with a female Viet freedom fighter, Rambo embarks on a reconnaissance mission.

programme.title: Movie: Rambo III
programme.desc: John Rambo, unwilling to accompany old friend Colonel Trautman behind Soviet lines in Afghanistan, ends up going there on an unofficial rescue mission after Trautman is captured.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: The Gloucester, Mass. fleets face off against their Southern counterparts in Outer Banks, N.C.

programme.title: Bermuda Triangle: The New Secrets
programme.desc: Using cutting-edge technology, experts investigate the truth behind the Bermuda triangle.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of the Red Tide
programme.desc: When a blood red mass is captured floating in the water, experts use cutting-edge technology to uncover if the crimson tide could actually be alive.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The Minotaur's Lair
programme.desc: A strange lake in Transylvania is the home of an abandoned village, and a terrifying secret. When an labyrinth is discovered on an island once home to an ancient Greek civilization, experts investigate if it was the legendary home of the Minotaur.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Americas' Lost Romans
programme.desc: The remains of an abandoned settlement high in the mountains of Peru could be an ancient Roman village, leaving experts to speculate if the Romans visited the Americas centuries before Columbus; if so, it could point to long-lost gold.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Amazon's Secret Nightmare
programme.desc: When satellites spot anomalies in the unexplored Amazonian jungle, experts wonder if they've discovered relics of a lost civilization. An on-the-ground investigation reveals a dark truth that's more sinister than ever imagined.

programme.title: American Monster: Looks Can Kill
programme.desc: When mysterious and beautiful Rebecca Thudin meets the dashing Larry Fenton, a whirlwind romance is sparked. The rich, successful pair seem to be a match made in heaven, until a murder exposes a tangled web of lies, deceit and buried secrets.

programme.title: American Monster: Life of the Party
programme.desc: Doug and Rose quickly strike up a romance and later marry. But behind the perfect façade seen in these exclusive home videos, lies and deceit begin to surface. A no show at Thanksgiving and a box on the roadside lead to a shocking discovery.

programme.title: American Monster: Live by the Sword
programme.desc: Outside Los Angeles, sword collector Neal Williams is the house-husband while his wife Manling keeps the family afloat. It's a tough but happy life, as their home videos attest. Until Manling returns home to find her family slaughtered - at sword point.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Under His Thumb
programme.desc: Jamie Clark had already been twice unlucky in love, so when she met Anthony Lord she thought the third time would be the charm. But by the time she realized what perverted plans he had for her, she was already trapped.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Didn't Know It Was Blood
programme.desc: As Christina Hildreth unwittingly helped Shawn Grate clean up his first crime scene, she didn't realize what she was doing. Once police were banging on her door while she was trapped with a madman, she understood the situation was direr than she realized.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Killed Dirty John
programme.desc: Not long after Terra Newell met her mother's new boyfriend, she sensed John Meehan was no good. Debra Newell never suspected her new man was secretly plotting to destroy her and her family. And Terra never imagined she would ultimately be forced to kill.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Didn't Know It Was Blood
programme.desc: As Christina Hildreth unwittingly helped Shawn Grate clean up his first crime scene, she didn't realize what she was doing. Once police were banging on her door while she was trapped with a madman, she understood the situation was direr than she realized.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Killed Dirty John
programme.desc: Not long after Terra Newell met her mother's new boyfriend, she sensed John Meehan was no good. Debra Newell never suspected her new man was secretly plotting to destroy her and her family. And Terra never imagined she would ultimately be forced to kill.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Son's Prisoner
programme.desc: Shelly Lietz had been afraid of her son ever since he was four years old. She knew she saw something evil in his eyes that scared her. As he got older and more violent, that fear crippled her, eventually making her a prisoner in her own home.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: After Midnight
programme.desc: A New Year's Eve party ends and a shot rings out. A young woman lies dead in her bedroom. Did she take her own life? Or did her husband kill her? Family members at war, a police department under fire, a husband on trial. What happened to Ashley Fallis?

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Deadly Business
programme.desc: A mother of three goes missing. Her car is found in flames but she is nowhere in sight. As police begin to investigate, they find she had been keeping a secret from her family-one that would point the case in an entirely new direction.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Do No Harm
programme.desc: A man is driving home when he sees a woman being dragged down the street against her will. Another man is visiting his girlfriend at work on Valentine's Day when a robber leaps onto the counter. Both men take heroic action, ensuring no harm is done.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Run With It
programme.desc: At an aquarium, thieves snatch a shark from an open tank and make a break for it, with employees hot on their heels. And then, two inmates make a clever escape by hiding in garbage cans. They're all on the run and the hunt is on to find them.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Snatched
programme.desc: A young woman walks home after a family gathering. Another young woman goes out to get cold medicine. Then, with no warning, danger strikes, and both women are kidnapped. But both brave victims outsmart their attackers.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Bold Moves
programme.desc: A gunfight erupts when a mother and daughter are forced to defend their business from an armed robber. And then, a man who tries to rob a martial arts instructor quickly realizes he has messed with the wrong person.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Malicious Hearts
programme.desc: Some women have ice running through their veins. They lack the instinct to care. A mom locks up and tortures her daughter like she's a prisoner-of-war; a helpful neighbor quietly kills her community; and lesbian lovers bash and burn a complete stranger.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Vengeance
programme.desc: When in love, some women no longer recognize the difference between right and wrong. If anyone blocks their path to true love, they bulldoze their way through, with lethal results. These Deadly Women have fire in their hearts when they seek 'Vengeance'.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Kiss Then Kill
programme.desc: Deadly women "kiss then kill" when love goes wrong.

programme.title: Deadly Women: If Looks Could Kill
programme.desc: Beauty is only skin deep; scratch the surface and you could find an ugly soul. A gorgeous girl preys on an elderly man, a cabaret star performs a killer finale, and a farmer's wife harvests husbands.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Broken Dreams
programme.desc: The only thing going for Christina Corrigan is Keith Belajonas, a cute 25-year-old she meets online. After a couple of years and kids, they marry. But the honeymoon won't last long, and the jagged edges of their broken dreams will lead to a blood bath.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: At Death's Door
programme.desc: Lynn and Manfred Schockner are millionaire executives at an aerospace engineering company. But underneath their privilege and wealth lies a twisted rage that ends in a lethal conspiracy.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Deadly Obsession
programme.desc: Tom and Lynette's love story spans decades from grade school to a posh house with a pool. But dark secrets from the bedroom bleed out onto other aspects of the marriage... and a dangerous obsession rips their romance into pieces.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Death Outranks Love
programme.desc: It's a military match made in heaven for Roger and Margorie. But a tangled nest of financial secrets and twisted lies ruins the young couple's future. And while the rise of their careers and romance seems meteoric, the ensuing fall is deadly.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Memphis Blues
programme.desc: In July of 2010, NBA star and family man Lorenzen Wright goes missing outside of Memphis, TN. When his dead body is discovered in the woods, investigators find that this case is far from a slam dunk.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Screaming Eagles in Afghanistan
programme.desc: In 2010, the 'Screaming Eagles' of the 101st Airborne Division face off against the Taliban during Operation Dragon Strike. The American soldiers of the 101st head up Afghanistan's 'Highway to Hell' to take back the countryside from a deadly enemy.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Road to Baghdad
programme.desc: See the shot by shot firefights in the 21 day bloody battle for Baghdad from the warrior's point of view.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Fallujah
programme.desc: Fallujah, Iraq's most volatile city, has become a haven for radical Muslim fighters from around the world. To root them out, the U.S. military unleashes Operation Phantom Fury. Soldiers and Marines engage the enemy in brutal urban combat.

programme.desc: US Army Rangers are the men of steel forged in the fire of every major conflict from the beaches of D-Day to the streets of Baghdad. Weaponology takes you through time to show how the Rangers always ride the cutting edge of military technology.

programme.title: Weaponology: Green Berets
programme.desc: Green Berets are the lords of unconventional warfare. From bolt-action rifles, to the latest air strike laser technology, Green Berets are the masters of multiple weapons systems. See how they operate under the most extreme conditions throughout history.

programme.title: Weaponology: SAS
programme.desc: The SAS go behind enemy lines and have revolutionised the global war on terrorism.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Yankees, Rebels and World War II
programme.desc: World War II myths are explored. Forgotten truths of America's Civil War are examined.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Discovering America
programme.desc: Explore the truth behind the men who discovered the New World and take a trip to discover the real facts behind the most famous bridge and road in America.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Pilgrims and Witches
programme.desc: The roots of America can be traced to the first settlers that came there. Learn that the Pilgrim 'Thanksgiving' was about fasting and the only 'witchcraft' in Salem was done by a group of young girls.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Strike From the Sky
programme.desc: British light infantry must crash land by glider in Northern France then take and hold two key bridges in the hands of a heavily armed enemy.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Rangers Lead the Way
programme.desc: United States Army Rangers spearhead one of the biggest amphibious landings in history: the Allied invasion of France. They must scale vertical cliffs before facing the enemy, then destroy the guns that threaten to blow the Allied forces out of the water.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Hitler's Last Bridge
programme.desc: A brave band of regular GI's are tasked with saving the last bridge and final gateway to the Third Reich. The bridge is bristling with German guns loaded with explosives. Worse, the enemy plan to destroy the bridge if the American unit assaults it.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Mountain Massacre
programme.desc: The Black Devils, a joint American-Canadian mountain warfare unit, are about to go into action. They must mount a do-or-die night-time assault up a treacherous mountain, in extreme weather, to take on heavily-entrenched battle hardened German defenses.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Retreat from Reality
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to fight to the very end, even if it costs millions of Germans their lives. He puts his faith in his the 'Wunderwaffe' and the 'wonder weapons,' including the first ever ballistic missile, the V2.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Teaching an Old Cabin New Tricks
programme.desc: For the past 20 years, a family has created lasting memories of their cabin overlooking Harpswell Sound, but the cabin is in need of some work to see the next 20 years and beyond.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Daggett Camp
programme.desc: Chase and team take on the Daggett Camp, which was owned by a famous Maine politician whose family wants to rehab it in only six weeks. A hidden surprise underneath the cabin threatens to derail the whole project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Stable Family Ties
programme.desc: Chase and the crew have their work cut out for them turning a vacation cabin that was originally a 1920s horse barn into a stable building for a large family. The crew draw on the past as inspiration and want to honour the owners' late parents.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Diamond in the Rough
programme.desc: After three women collectively buy a cabin they describe as 'a diamond in the rough on a pretty lot,' they are determined to prove the naysayers wrong and create the cabin of their dreams.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Dated Cabin Turned Retreat
programme.desc: Chase and his team take on a dated and dysfunctional cabin in Belgrade Lakes, one of Maine's most desirable regions. They try to turn the cabin into the perfect family retreat with a budget of $40,000 and six weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: 130-Year-Old Island Cabin
programme.desc: Chase and his team tackle the renovation of a 130-year-old cabin located on an island with a budget of $40,000 and a time frame of six weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Dream Come True
programme.desc: A couple with five children calls on the Cabin Masters to take their newly purchased camp on David Pond and turn it into a family vacation cabin that will serve as a central part of their lives for generations to come.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Dated Cabin Turned Retreat

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: 130-Year-Old Island Cabin

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Backyard TLC
programme.desc: The backyard at Rob's Wellington project has a ton of potential but the overgrown plants are blocking the view. By extending the patio, trimming trees and adding some TLC, the backyard is back and better than ever.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Top Ten Waterfront Cabins
programme.desc: Builder Chase Morrill teams up with his family to save and transform abandoned cabins.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Lobster Legacy Shack
programme.desc: A couple inherited their quaint cabin from his grandfather, who originally built the cabin by hand in 1978. With a newly built wharf, the team focus on transforming the former fish and lobster shack into a fun family cabin.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: An Uphill Battle
programme.desc: Lifelong Mainers bought their Belgrade cabin in 1987 and have maintained it over the years, but the list of needed repairs continues to grow. Chase and the team give the camp much-needed life by rebuilding its front wall and replacing the heating system.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: It Takes a Village
programme.desc: Founded in 1935, Agassiz Village has provided underprivileged and at-risk kids an opportunity to experience camp. Chase and his team take on a big project with a small budget to help the camp with the support of the community.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Top 10 Family Retreats
programme.desc: The Cabin Masters share the Top 10 family retreats as voted on by the fans.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Ain't Seen Nothing Yet
programme.desc: After hiring her neighbour to renovate her kitchen, Lali has nothing but a demo to show for the $11,000 she paid him.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: To Mike, From Aggie
programme.desc: A nurse who works countless hours at a brain injury center is too busy supporting her family to fix the many problems in her new house. Her mother-in-law Aggie is so desperate to help she delivers a letter straight to Mike's mailbox.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Broken Record
programme.desc: Mike and his team come to the rescue of Sheila and Val, a couple scammed out of their money, their kitchen and their trust by a notorious contracting criminal who would occasionally do one good job to lure other unsuspecting clients.

programme.title: Building Alaska: My Life Is in Your Hands
programme.desc: Three new couples challenge the Alaskan elements. Mike and Kathleen Kondus build atop a windy tundra, first-time builders Mike and Teresa Oldenkamp construct a complex cabin and Paige Drobny and Cody Strathe create a dog-training facility on haunted land.

programme.title: Building Alaska: A Life of Near Misses
programme.desc: Paige and Cody realize they don't have the correct insulation for their log walls. Kathleen and Mike's team get dangerously high up to install the ridge beam. Mike and Teresa begin work on their floor, but discover the joists are not evenly spaced.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Fry Hard I: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown "reloads" his classic fish-and-chips show with a brand-new recipe for French fries and fish sticks.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Art Of Darkness II: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown "reloads" his classic cocoa powder show with three updated dishes including a new twist on brownies, an introduction to black cardamom and a scientific road race.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Flay vs. Wexler
programme.desc: Iron Chef Bobby Flay faces off against Challenger Micah Wexler. Chef Wexler is a James Beard award semi-finalist for Rising Star Chef of the Year 2012. Judges are Anthony Anderson, Karine Bakhoum and Michael Ruhlman.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Tournament of Champions: Garces vs. Forgione
programme.desc: In this first round of the Iron Chef America Tournament of Champions, Iron Chefs Jose Garces and Marc Forgione face off in Kitchen Stadium.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Tournament of Champions: Zakarian vs. Guarnaschelli
programme.desc: In this first round of the Iron Chef America Tournament of Champions, Iron Chef Geoffrey Zakarian faces off against Iron Chef Alex Guarnaschelli.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Tournament of Champions: Garces vs. Morimoto

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Tournament of Champions: Zakarian vs. Symon
programme.desc: Chef Geoffrey Zakarian battles Chef Michael Symon. The judges for this battle are Ree Drummond, Aaron Sanchez, and Trisha Yearwood.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Tournament of Champions: Finale
programme.desc: In this final round of the Iron Chef America Tournament of Champions, Iron Chefs Jose Garces and Michael Symon battle in Kitchen Stadium. Judges Donatella Arpaia, Bobby Flay and Karine Bakhoum will crown one Grand Champion.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Boston Sweets
programme.desc: Unique Sweets is an insider's peek into innovative eateries across America that are creating the most unique and exciting desserts today.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Chocolate
programme.desc: Concoctions that celebrate chocolate.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sweet Tour Of Queens
programme.desc: We venture out of New York City to the incredibly diverse borough of Queens and find one of a kind baked treats. Rudy's Bakery and CafT has been putting their own spin on classics like the German Chocolate Cake since 1934.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Surf, Sun and Sweets
programme.desc: Hawaii is more than just pristine beaches: it's also home to some incredible sweet treats. Lee Anne Wong serves sweet brunch specialties at Koko Head Cafe, while Via Gelato blends Hawaiian flavors with Italian techniques to make innovative frozen sweets.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Deep Freeze
programme.desc: These frozen treats go far beyond vanilla, chocolate and strawberry scoots. In Honolulu, Shimazu Store pushes the boundaries of shave ice, a uniquely Hawaiian treat. In New York, Ice and Vice uses unconventional ingredients to create edgy desserts.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Donuts For Days
programme.desc: Anyway you fry it, America loves donuts, and these three shops are a cut above the rest. There are vegan delights at Donut Friend in Los Angeles, with everything from berries and mint to donut sandwiches.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Beautiful Bites
programme.desc: Ted Allen, Michael Symon, Marcela Valladolid, and Duff Goldman are curating a collection of the most beautiful bites around, from oysters and pearls at the French Laundry to black bass at La Bernardin.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Game Changer
programme.desc: Food Network stars indulge in unexpected flavour combinations from around the country. Michael Symon is in Cleveland for blue cheese guacamole and John T. Edge gets his pistachio fix on pizza in Arizona.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Phoenix
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the multicultural cuisine of Phoenix, Ariz. A heavy Mexican influence is present throughout the restaurant scene in dishes like chilaquiles and pazole.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Panama City
programme.desc: Andrew digs in to Panama City's classic tastes inspired by the blended cultures that make up the capital city's population. From fried whole fish and plantains to citric ceviche and yucca fritters, the Latin flair of this city seasons every dish.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Boston: A Second Bite
programme.desc: Boston is the heart of New England, the birthplace of American independence and home to so many delicious foods that it calls for more than one visit! Andrew Zimmern explores the flavours of Boston neighborhoods.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Amman
programme.desc: Andrew introduces the rich and welcoming dishes of Amman, Jordan. The city's multicultural influences have created a culinary scene steeped in hospitality. Andrew samples some of the more well-known dishes such as towers of goat and veggies and more.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Puerto Rico
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern checks out San Juan, Puerto Rico's comfort foods, and beach eats.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Houston
programme.desc: Andrew explores Houston's Tex-Mex fajitas, Czech pastry, and Cajun mashups.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Columbus, Ohio
programme.desc: Casey Webb's countrywide edible expedition brings him to Columbus, Ohio. His massive meals include a bacon-wrapped hot dog with a crazy combination of toppings and a footlong chicken burrito blanketed in ghost pepper sauce.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Providence, Rhode Island
programme.desc: Adam visits Providence, Rhode Island for a unique grilled pizza and for the infamous Triple Murder Burger. Adam's journey concludes with him coaching a rugby player through 15 fully loaded hot wieners in 45 minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: St. Louis, MO
programme.desc: Casey Webb visits St. Louis, Missouri, in search of the biggest and best the city has to offer. He encounters a four-pound meatball and tackles a New York-style pizza so massive he'll need the help of a partner to take it down.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Los Angeles, California
programme.desc: Casey travels to sunny Los Angeles for some epic eats including a 2.5-pound fusion burrito loaded with every ingredient in the kitchen and drenched in hot sauce 600 times hotter than a jalapeno.

programme.desc: Bob takes Bingo and Rolly to a 'Captain Dog!' event where the pugs get to be heroes for a day. The pups try to find ways to keep Bob cool on a hot summer day.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Fantastic Pet Force / Sea No Turtle
programme.desc: The puppies leap into action to assemble their own real-life team of puppy heroes. Bob takes the pugs on a conservation vacation where he volunteers to study sea turtles.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Rock-A-Bye Birdie/ The Fly-Along
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy must impress Captain Beakman when she joins them for a ride-a-long delivery. When Mimi the mockingbird sings K.C.'s lullaby she puts everyone at T.O.T.S. to sleep.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: All Aboard Babies
programme.desc: A tenacious penguin and a kind hearted flamingo train to be delivery birds.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Bird Beard / The Royal Egg Hunt
programme.desc: When Santa and Mrs. Claus have an unusual problem during their summer vacation, the Pugs and Keia help save their trip! The Pugs help find the Queen of England's jeweled egg.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: A Light for the Lighthouse / Music City Mishap
programme.desc: When the pugs find out that the light on Bob's favourite lighthouse isn't working, they go on a mission to fix it. Then, While in Nashville, Bingo and Rolly find a lost guitar and go on a mission to return it to its rightful owner.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: A Gollywood Wedding!/ No Dilly Dally in New Delhi!
programme.desc: Mickey and his pals travel to New Delhi, India, for the wedding of their friends Savi and Raj. The Happy Helpers assist an old friend who runs an auto-rickshaw business by being Tuk-Tuk Drivers for the day.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Goofasaur!/ Teahouse Helpers
programme.desc: A tour of Tokyo goes sideways when Goofy accidentally unleashes a robot dinosaur upon the city! Minnie takes her friends to experience a traditional Japanese tea ceremony.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Night Flight/ Slippery When Wet
programme.desc: Freddy must face his fear of the dark when he and Pip are assigned a nighttime delivery. Pip hopes to speed through the next delivery, but they are tasked to deliver a baby sloth.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Big Little Baby / The Super Secret Mission
programme.desc: A tenacious penguin and a kind hearted flamingo train to be delivery birds.

programme.title: Bluey: Hammerbarn / Feather Wand / Dance Mode
programme.desc: While on a trip to the store, Bluey and Bingo create their own mini-homes side-by-side in the trolley. Later, when Bingo isn't invited to Chloe's party, she uses a magic feather wand to make things incredibly heavy.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Danger Games
programme.desc: Frustrated by his failed villainy, Dr. Minyak plans to ruin Double G's worldwide charity concert. Captain Man and Kid Danger join forces with the Game Shakers to defeat Dr. Minyak and keep Double G safe.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Brawl in the Hall
programme.desc: When Charlotte is challenged to a fight at school, Captain Man and Kid Danger step in to try and help Charlotte defend herself.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Better Off Wed
programme.desc: The kids learn that Dr. Colosso ruined their parents' wedding years earlier, and want to recreate Hank and Barb's dream day as their anniversary gift.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Ditch Perfect
programme.desc: When Phoebe learns Max's band plans to dump him, she suspects that his superhero training is hurting his friendships. Determined to help, she attempts to repair things with the band, but her good deeds quickly backfire.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Vicky Loses Her Icky/ Pixies Inc.
programme.desc: Timmy wishes for Vicky to be nice; the anti-fun Pixies take over Fairyworld.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Spaced Out/ Transparents
programme.desc: Timmy wishes for an authentic alien; Cosmo and Wanda must pose as real parents.

programme.desc: Splinter enters the Turtle Tank in a demolition derby. And, Splinter teaches his sons the Art of Ninja Concealment.

programme.desc: The turtles argue about how to get a piece of the mystic metal from Repo Mantis. Ghostbear decides to mess with the turtles during a snow day.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Cloak and Swaggart/ Jupiter Jim Ahoy!
programme.desc: The turtles are back and this time they've got awesome powers.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Insane in the Mama Train
programme.desc: The turtles are back and this time they've got awesome powers.

programme.title: The Loud House: Strife of the Party/Kernel of Truth

programme.desc: Dad gets upset with the kids for never locking the front door; Lincoln accidentally erases his childhood photos.

programme.desc: Miss Priss has Krabby Patties banned from Bikini Bottom; SpongeBob's cousin visits.

programme.desc: Plankton disguises himself as SpongeBob's grandmother.

programme.desc: Spongebob and Patrick take Squidward jelly fishing; Spongebob falls for Plankton's scheme.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pineapple Fever/ Chum Caverns

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shellback Shenanigans/ Hide and Then What Happens?
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick play hide n' seek and SpongeBob searches the world for Patrick. Plankton masquerades as Gary to steal the Krabby Patty formula.

programme.desc: Bob and Pat's favourite superheroes are in a retirement home; Bob loses self-confidence.

programme.desc: Spongebob and Sandy compete in extreme underwater sports; Spongebob and Pat visit the zoo.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Mikey Gets Shellacne

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Target: April O'Neil

The American Game: Integration
programme.desc: As much as any other sport, the history of college football tells the history of American race relations. You can't appreciate the sport's complexities without knowing how long the road has been, and continues to be, towards equal rights.

programme.title: The American Game: Evolution
programme.desc: College football has evolved in so many transformative ways. All throughout its history, the sport's constant evolutions have had common threads, with officials and coaches striving to make it safer, more exciting and more entertaining.

programme.title: The Greatest: Inspiring Moments
programme.desc: If the best parts of sports are how they can inspire people, college football has enjoyed a wealth of unforgettable moments that fans will cherish forever. These are the top 11 of those highlights, on the field and off.

programme.title: The Greatest: Innovations
programme.desc: College football has continually evolved and innovated in ways that have made the game safer, more entertaining, and more exciting. These are the top 11 innovations that have impacted the sport's history.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Three G's

programme.desc: Rose's cousin Sven, arrives in Miami for a visit just prior to him being married by arrangement. However, when Blanche plays a trick on her latest beau, which involves Sven, the naive groom falls for her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Charlie's Buddy
programme.desc: A wartime buddy of Rose's late husband arrives in Miami to see Rose. However, he has more in mind than just a friendly visit. Meanwhile, Dorothy and Blanche haggle over the same dress to wear to a social event.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Accurate Conception
programme.desc: Blanche's daughter, Rebecca, has some wonderful news. She's going to become a mother through artificial insemination. However, Blanche is less than thrilled and totally against the entire idea.

programme.title: Movie: Winter Love Story
programme.desc: An author publishes her first novel, but it fails to sell well so she embarks on a book tour. While on tour, she meets a handsome fantasy-author that helps boost her sales, and a romance quickly follows.

programme.title: Movie: Perfect Match
programme.desc: When an engaged couple can't agree on anything, the mother of the groom hires a wedding planner and an event planner to help. The two planners are as different as night and day, but they soon learn opposites do indeed attract.

programme.title: Movie: Austin Powers: The Spy Who Shagged Me
programme.desc: A groovy spy travels back in time to stop his arch nemesis from taking over the world.

programme.title: South Park: Scott Tenorman Must Die
programme.desc: Cartman is excited that he has finally entered puberty when he gets pubes of his very own. After the other boys explain that pubes don't count unless you grow them, Cartman realizes he been tricked and sets in motion a dastardly plot for revenge.

programme.title: South Park: Asspen
programme.desc: While the adults are trapped at a time-share sales meeting, Stan is challenged by the best skier on the mountain to compete for the prettiest girl's affections.

programme.title: South Park: Casa Bonita
programme.desc: Kyle chooses Stan, Kenny and Butters to celebrate his birthday at Casa Bonita. When Cartman finds out he's not invited, he arranges for Butters to conveniently go 'missing.'

programme.title: South Park: Elementary School Musical
programme.desc: The boys must embrace the latest fad to hit South Park Elementary or risk their status as the coolest kids in school.

programme.title: South Park: Timmy! 2000

programme.title: South Park: Chickenlover

programme.title: South Park: Sexual Harassment Panda
programme.desc: After Sexual Harassment Panda 'educates' the children, Cartman sues Stan for sexual harassment, and a flurry of other lawsuits follow.

programme.title: South Park: You Got F'd in the A
programme.desc: Stan just got served, and now it's up to him to put together a team of South Park's best dancers to compete against a troupe from Orange County.

programme.title: South Park: Christian Rock Hard
programme.desc: When the other boys kick Cartman out of their band, he pulls his own group together to make music for Jesus.

programme.desc: Deputy Chief Brenda Johnson has to deal with an unexpected visit from her mother. Brenda's boyfriend, Agent Fritz Howard, was planning to move in, but will have to put their move on hold. An investigation becomes more complicated with each clue.

programme.title: The Closer: Slippin'
programme.desc: Deputy Chief Brenda Johnson investigates the shooting of three youngsters. The shooting has all the marks of a gang related crime. Meanwhile Brenda must deal with her mother.

programme.title: The Closer: Aftertaste
programme.desc: A young woman at a high-priced restaurant is murdered; Brenda turns 40.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: See One, Do One, Teach One
programme.desc: Detective Rizzoli and medical examiner Isles investigate the grisly murder of a wealthy couple. The M.O. matches the work of a serial killer known as the Surgeon. Now that the Surgeon is behind bars, it seems a protégé is picking up where he left off.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Boston Strangler Redux
programme.desc: Tensions are high as the squad investigates a possible copycat of the legendary Boston Strangler.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Sympathy for the Devil
programme.desc: Jane and Maura investigate the mysterious death of a young boy who may have died during an attempted exorcism.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: She Works Hard for the Money
programme.desc: After a student is gunned down in broad daylight, the investigation reveals she had more than a few secrets. Meanwhile, Jane's mother Angela gets into a spat with her father over the car.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: The eldest brother in a Boston Brahmin family is found in the harbour dead after an apparent sailing accident. Maura's close connection with the family and Jane's resentment over their wealth threaten to derail the investigation.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: I Kissed a Girl
programme.desc: Jane and Maura investigate what appears to be a hate crime: the brutal assault and murder of a woman leaving a lesbian bar. With Jane going undercover, they hope to lure the killer out in the open.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Boston Marathon: The Manhunt (Part 2)
programme.desc: With the Boston Bombing suspects identified as domestic terrorist brothers, the manhunt begins, a terrifying crime spree ensues, and new information sheds light on the heinous crime.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Atlanta Serial Killer: Do You Know Where Your Children Are? (Part 1)
programme.desc: From 1979 to 1981, more than two dozen of Atlanta’s black children, mostly boys and young men, disappeared without a trace. Someone was killing the city's most vulnerable children for an unknown reason.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Atlanta Serial Killer: The KKK Connection? (Part 2)
programme.desc: Investigators believe Wayne Williams, a 23-year-old black man, murdered more than two dozen black children and young men in Atlanta. The 40 year-old evidence is re-examined using modern forensics in search of more answers.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Aaron Hernandez: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: Aaron Hernandez is a star player for the New England Patriots, and is set up for greatness. But after a body is found riddled with bullets a short distance from his home, forensic evidence soon ties Hernandez to the killing.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: James Jordan: Vanished
programme.desc: When in 1993, James Raymond Jordan Sr. goes missing and his luxury car is found stripped and abandoned in North Carolina, clues point to a tragic crime.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Susan Smith: Someone Stole My Babies (Part 1)
programme.desc: A deep look at some of the most notorious crimes and mysteries of our time.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Susan Smith: The Shocking Truth (Part 2)
programme.desc: A deep look at some of the most notorious crimes and mysteries of our time.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: James Jordan: Vanished
programme.desc: When in 1993, James Raymond Jordan Sr. goes missing and his luxury car is found stripped and abandoned in North Carolina, clues point to a tragic crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Hearted
programme.desc: After a man dies with no proof of foul play, investigators learn that another man died the exact same way six years earlier. The men had one thing in common: at the time of their deaths, they were married to the same woman.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wheel of Misfortune
programme.desc: A woman's disappearance is tracked by a casino's security cameras. Investigators collect enough evidence left behind from the victim to inform them of who was responsible and how she disappeared.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Covet Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Olamide Elizabeth Adeyooye, a science major has been missing for 48 hrs, and her family grows increasingly concerned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writing on the Wall
programme.desc: A gorgeous flight attendant is brutally murdered in her own home and the laundry list of suspects is growing by the minute. A striking clue at the scene leads investigators in the wrong direction, but will forensic evidence get them back on track?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Brew
programme.desc: When the head of the Coors Brewing Company is kidnapped and held for ransom, it kicked off one of the most intense manhunts in American history. See how forensic science helped track down the kidnappers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Message in a Bottle
programme.desc: When an attractive young Missouri woman is found dead in her apartment, police meticulously generate a suspect list a mile long. The culprit turns out to be the most unlikely suspect with an insatiable lust for power and control.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair Line
programme.desc: Doctors don't know why the young scientist is gravely ill. When tests finally reveal the cause, it's too late to save him. Police hope that lab analysis of his hair - showing when attempts were made on his life and what was used - will lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All That Glitters Is Gold
programme.desc: A bullet-riddled car, a missing driver and no witnesses poses a mystery, until a tiny and unique clue is found.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: James Jordan: Vanished
programme.desc: When in 1993, James Raymond Jordan Sr. goes missing and his luxury car is found stripped and abandoned in North Carolina, clues point to a tragic crime.

programme.desc: While serving time for aggravated kidnapping in Utah and facing first degree murder charges in Colorado, Ted Bundy escaped not once, but twice from authorities.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Ted Bundy: The Murder Trials
programme.desc: Ted Bundy helped prepare his own defense, but would his amateur lawyering help him beat the rap or send him to the electric chair?

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Ted Bundy: The Death Row Confessions
programme.desc: Ted Bundy maintains his innocence. But as the clock wound down on his final death warrant, Ted Bundy made a last desperate attempt to save his own life he: began to talk.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Drowning Sorrows
programme.desc: A family vacation turns tragic when a family matriarch suffers a tragic fall to her death. The circumstances surround the fall lead the investigators to think foul play was involved. Findings from a pathologist confirm their doubts.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As Fault
programme.desc: A young mother goes missing after a night out. Police suspect foul play and begin looking into the woman's strained family life for answers. When the case goes from missing persons to homicide, a man claims an accident was to blame.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Range Ridin'
programme.desc: When the ranch comes under fire from encroaching hunters, Gabe takes it upon himself to learn to ride a horse as the family constructs a fence around the property. And later, Gabe and Raquell leave the mountain for the birth of their baby girl.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Bush Below Zero
programme.desc: A life-threatening cold front approaches the mountain and the family prioritizes shelters for their livestock. The task is easier said than done, as it will require the siblings to make a risky journey to a neighboring mountain to salvage lumber.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Off the Grid: Water to Ice
programme.desc: Loaded with exclusive new footage from the Bush: The ranch hits a new crisis after the water supply freezes. Meanwhile, a load of important lumber is at the base of the mountain, forcing the Wolfpack to think creatively.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: A Bottle for Your Thoughts
programme.desc: Bear overnights in the wild as he absorbs life-changing news. A gentler Bam takes the lead on a critical next step of the main house build, while Noah creates a Bush Monster Plow to clear heavy snow. Sister Bird makes an unusual gift for Gabe.

programme.title: Expeditions to the Edge: Man Overboard
programme.desc: The crew receives an ominous warning from the Coast Guard and must make a tough decision. Abandoning the mission would require overwintering in the Arctic, but a desperate attempt to push through and escape the Northwest Passage could be fatal.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: France: South Africa Strike Out
programme.desc: Wilderness experts Laurent and Valerie get dropped into a heat-stricken savannah in South Africa where leopards and hyenas reign, and deadly snakes and scorpions are at every corner. Their journey is translated into English.

programme.desc: Jonathan Klay and Alison Teal are marooned on a Maldivian Island for 21 days.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Steel to Heal
programme.desc: When Welderup general manager Joe discovers his two-year-old son has cancer, Steve enlists the crew to build a custom vehicle that he hopes will show anyone who is battling the disease that there is life after the struggle.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: To the Moon!
programme.desc: Chad uses a station wagon to create a space-age drag car. The car must be suitable for space travel with wings, in-line seating, and capped off by an 18-inch bubble.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Dirty Hands, Clean Money
programme.desc: The cut rate supercharger Colton brought in threatens to derail to entire build of the custom dragster with bubble top, wings, and inline seating.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: For Kings and Queens
programme.desc: Chad uses a 1935 Hupmobile for an elegant 1930s speedster to debut at a charity golf tournament.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Cooler Than Dangit
programme.desc: Chad builds a custom bare metal truck to give away at his Rockabilly car show. With the tightest of budgets, the team builds the truck from scratch, and Chad's wild ideas keep them in overdrive.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: They Call Me Bad Chad
programme.desc: Chad builds a one-of-a-kind coupe with square parts, recycled metal, and a 1939 Studebaker Commander.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: You Use What You Got
programme.desc: Looking to expand his business, Chad takes on a commission to build a custom 1930s style delivery truck, starting from a discarded 1934 Desoto Airflow coupe.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Chad vs. Pinto
programme.desc: Chad takes on his most ambitious build yet: transforming a rusted-out 1971 Pinto into a European-style performance car framed in glass. With only four weeks to work and a mountain of problems facing him, Chad risks missing a deadline for the first time.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Performance Pinto
programme.desc: The team continues converting the rusted '71 Pinto into a European performance car despite the passed deadline. Unwilling to compromise on the original vision, Chad presses on both day and night to get his creation ready for its dramatic big city reveal.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: My Day, Mom's Way
programme.desc: Pageant queen Anastagia wants to choose her own dress for once, but she needs to battle her mother's strong influence first. Christalyne must broaden her colour pallet to please traditional Indian in-laws. Lisa butts heads with her mom over an ivory gown.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Design Intervention
programme.desc: Patti Ann goes to Chicago to find the perfect dress for her destination wedding.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: Vacation: Impossible
programme.desc: As major construction begins on their house, Courtney and Eric decide to take their first family vacation with the sextuplets. But between baby and big boy meltdowns, they struggle to keep everyone happy at the same time.

programme.desc: After a traumatic stillbirth, Jen is pregnant again and is terrified to tell anybody for fear that history will repeat itself. Chanda is afraid to tell her parents she's pregnant out of wedlock again.
